programme.title: The Sweeney

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A huge scandal threatens Bohemia, as Holmes is outwitted by a bewitching woman's blackmail who owns a compromising photograph of a European royal. Period detective drama, starring Jeremy Brett as the brilliant Baker Street sleuth, with David Burke as his trusty companion Dr Watson, guest starring Gayle Hunnicutt(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: Strange, seemingly malevolent encoded messages sour a wealthy man's wedded bliss, prompting him to seek Holmes's expertise. Victorian mystery, starring Jeremy Brett and David Burke(n)

programme.title: The Casebook of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: The super-sleuth visits a village to investigate a number of mysterious deaths, and tries to prove they have a logical rather than a supernatural explanation. Feature-length drama, starring Jeremy Brett, with Roy Marsden and Keith Barron(n)

programme.title: Hornblower
programme.desc: First episode of the drama based on CS Forester's tales of an 18th-century seafaring adventurer. The 17-year-old Horatio Hornblower experiences seasickness while still in Spithead as he begins his Navy career and runs into trouble with a tormentor - until war with France gives him a chance to prove himself in the heat of battle. Ioan Gruffudd and Robert Lindsay star(n)

programme.title: The Towering Inferno (1974)
programme.desc: The world's tallest building goes up in flames during the opening celebrations. While the architect who designed the skyscraper tries to save the party-goers trapped on the 135th floor, a fire chief leads a valiant attempt to fight the blaze. Disaster movie, starring Paul Newman, Steve McQueen, Faye Dunaway, William Holden, Fred Astaire, Richard Chamberlain, Susan Blakely and Robert Vaughn(n)

programme.title: Fishing Impossible
programme.desc: Fishing show, which sees contributors Charles Butcher, Jason Lewis and Thomas Hird, aka The Blowfish, head to British Columbia in search of the elusive coho salmon. The trio must work out a way to catch a Coho without ending up as dinner for the bears(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: The pathologist's new girlfriend, Lynne, asks him to marry her, but pressure of work and memories of his troubled relationship with first wife Helen prevent him accepting(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Two brothers end up killing a priest at a Catholic school when a truck hijack goes wrong. The case proves embarrassing for the cops, since Crocker was giving a lecture at the time(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: An ailing diplomat asks Holmes to retrieve a document about a highly sensitive treaty between Britain and Italy, which an opportunistic thief has stolen from his desk at the Foreign Office. Drama, starring Jeremy Brett, David Burke and David Gwillim(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Boxer Lewis Nelson hires Ray to keep his gambling-addicted wife away from the casino he partly owns. However, she persuades Arthur to play the roulette wheels on her behalf, tempting him with the 'winning system' she has devised. Comedy starring George Cole(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Cowley and the team present a line of defence against groups of mercenaries and guerrillas who are waging war on the streets of Britain. David Suchet and Geoffrey Palmer guest star alongside Martin Shaw, Lewis Collins and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: The Flying Squad is called in to catch a gunman who has stolen cash from a lock-up. Hard-hitting detective drama, starring John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

programme.title: Quincy ME
programme.desc: A Marine dies in what seems to be a tragic accident during training and the autopsy indicates drowning, but Quincy's second opinion points to a more complex case of murder(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Theo investigates the murder of a plastic surgeon shot dead in his car, and arrests a drug dealer - only to find that the victim was already dead when the gun was fired(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A music teacher asks Holmes to discover the identity of a mysterious bearded cyclist who often follows at a distance as she makes her way to work. Period crime drama, guest starring Barbara Wilshere, Michael Siberry and John Castle(n)

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Arthur acquires an old police coach and launches a sight-seeing business. However, it is not long before the vehicle breaks down and his passengers are forced to seek refuge at the Winchester. Drama, starring George Cole and Gary Webster(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie is captured and held hostage in a vicarage by four German terrorists - and as time runs out, he finds himself forced to make a deal with them before anyone gets hurt. Gabrielle Drake guest stars, with Lewis Collins, Martin Shaw and Gordon Jackson(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Two villains rob an art dealer of a valuable Goya painting, which they plan to sell in Amsterdam. Regan deduces the dealer's female assistant is an accomplice, and after leaning on her sets off to track down the duo. Seventies crime drama, starring John Thaw(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as contestants Colin Baker, David Weir, Chelsee Healey and Alex Horne pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: Documentary focused on rescue efforts across the British Isles, featuring access to Mountain Rescue teams, Coast Guard and air ambulances. In the first edition, a rescue team in Kerry is called to Carrantuohil, the highest mountain in Ireland, to rescue an American couple who have got lost and are experiencing some of the worst weather Ireland can produce. On the Humber estuary, the Humber Inshore Lifeboat is called to a reported body on the banks of the river, but the job turns out to be a false alarm(n)

programme.title: Rescue - River Deep, Mountain High
programme.desc: On Ullswater in the Lake District, the Patterdale Mountain Rescue team is called to assist a man who has broken his leg on the far shore of the lake, the second longest in the UK. Thankfully, the team has a high-speed boat in which to rush to his aid. In the Gap of Dunloe County in Kerry, a 22-year-old climber has fallen 75ft and hit a boulder. He has regained consciousness but has broken several bones and his pelvis. The Kerry Mountain Rescue Team, National Ambulance service and Irish Coast Guard helicopter winch him 200ft on a stretcher to the hovering helicopter(n)

programme.title: Get Carter (1971)
programme.desc: Racketeer Jack Carter returns to his native Newcastle to attend his brother's funeral and investigate the circumstances surrounding his death. As events unfold, he uncovers troubling connections to drugs, pornography and corruption, and finds himself on a collision-course with a criminal kingpin and his cohorts. Mike Hodges' thriller, starring Michael Caine, Ian Hendry, Britt Ekland, Glynn Edwards and John Osborne(n)

programme.title: Jaws 3 (1983)
programme.desc: A shark is captured by divers and put on display in a Florida marine centre, where it ultimately dies. However, examination of the body reveals the seemingly fully-grown shark was actually a baby - and its enormous, ferocious mother soon comes looking for it. Thriller sequel, originally released in cinemas in 3D, starring Dennis Quaid, Simon MacCorkindale, Louis Gossett Jr and Bess Armstrong(n)

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: A murderer plays twisted mind games on the emotionally fragile woman who saw him disposing of the body, in the hope of driving her to suicide. Guest starring William Katt (Carrie)(n)

programme.title: The Adventures of Sherlock Holmes
programme.desc: A distinguished Army colonel is found dead in mysterious circumstances and the finger of suspicion points to his widow. programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: When Ray's van breaks down, Arthur takes to the water using a barge to transport a cargo of dodgy video recorders. However, the fearsome Bible-quoting Welshman who owns them is on his tail. George Cole and Gary Webster star(n)

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: Bodie and Doyle are asked to investigate an incident dating back to 1953 after a death-bed confession reveals the key witness in a major corruption trial did not commit suicide as was believed, but was murdered by the police officers assigned to protect her. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins(n)

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan's informer Popeye is abducted after passing on information about a switch of some stolen diamonds. Working with Carter, the DI must catch the villains while protecting their source. Roy Kinnear guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman(n)

However, examination of the body reveals the seemingly fully-grown shark was actually a baby - and its enormous, ferocious mother soon comes looking for it. Thriller sequel, originally released in cinemas in 3D, starring Dennis Quaid, Simon MacCorkindale, Louis Gossett Jr and Bess Armstrong(n)

Her first guest is TV presenter and former Strictly winner Ore Oduba, who indulges in a luxury three-day tour of the Lake District. Finally, former royal reporter Jennie Bond takes her best friend Sue on a fun trip to Portugal's vibrant capital, Lisbon(n)

programme.title: Tribal Teens - Here Comes Trouble
programme.desc: British teenagers get the wake-up call of a lifetime as they are challenged to live among the world's toughest tribes, tasked to survive in some of the planet's most extreme and hostile environments. Unmotivated 18-year-old Ethan and 16-year-old pampered princess Alex are flown deep into the Peruvian rainforest, home of the Ashaninka tribe. There are no let-ups, no lie-ins and no luxury as the pair are forced to forage for food in the oppressively humid conditions with only the most basic of living conditions provided(n)

programme.title: Great Artists
programme.desc: Tim Marlow examines the work of Italian Renaissance painter Raffaello Santi, known better simply as Raphael, who was born in 1483 and achieved so much in his 37-year life that he was considered equal to Leonardo da Vinci and Michelangelo. He was highly regarded for his many studies of the Madonna and Child, and artists adopted his idealised forms as the model of beauty until the end of the 19th century(n)

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Art Burke hits a melting ice crossing and a load that is right at the weight limit. Steph Custance finds out whether she will be joining the Polar team, Darrell takes a big risk when he finds his usual route has been closed and heads into uncharted territory, and Lisa has to carry out a dangerous manoeuvre - bump-starting a truck with a full load(n)

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Trainer Graeme Hall comes to the aid of more dog owners at their wits' end dealing with their four-legged friends. He helps a woman teach a determined doberman to obey not just her but her elderly parents as well, reunites two dachshunds who have gone from the best of friends to the worst of enemies, and tries to calm the ardour of a hairdresser's French bulldog(n)

programme.title: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programme.desc: Ben Fogle meets a former carpenter who now lives alone on a private island in the Icelandic wilderness. He discusses how a struggle with alcoholism drove him to turn his back on life in the big city, and enlists Ben's aid in fishing and harvesting, as well as maintaining his yurt business. They also go swimming in the freezing waters and take a trek up the country's most famous volcano - and discover how the island could be under threat from Iceland's volatile environment(n)

programme.title: Murdered on My Honeymoon
programme.desc: The stories of two honeymoons that ended in murder. In 2008, a South Wales were found shot in their idyllic chalet on the Caribbean island of Antigua, while in 2011, a bride returned to her hotel room, only to be found dead in the bath - a case that remains unsolved after seven years. Featuring expert testimony, and personal accounts from journalists and family members(n)

programme.title: Missing or Murdered?
programme.desc: Examining high-profile cases which remain unsolved, resulting in agony for families of the victims and frustration for the police. The first episode focuses on the case of Lee Boxell, a 15-year-old who disappeared in South London in 1988, never to be seen again. Lee's parents have lived without answers for more than 30 years, and long to know what happened to their teenage son(n)

programme.title: FernGully: The Last Rainforest (1992)
programme.desc: A fairy living in a forest encounters a member of a lumber crew and magically shrinks him down to her size. He learns about the damage humans are doing to the area, and helps defend it when his fellow loggers unwittingly unleash an evil spirit that had been entombed in a tree. Animated adventure, with the voices of Robin Williams, Christian Slater and Tim Curry(n)

programme.title: The Three Stooges (2012)
programme.desc: Three babies left abandoned on an orphanage doorstep grow up into a bungling, accident prone trio of maintenance men. When the children's home is threatened with closure, they try to raise the money to save it, getting drawn into a murder plot and becoming the stars of a reality TV show. Slapstick comedy, with Sean Hayes, Will Sasso and Chris Diamantopoulos(n)

programme.title: Small Soldiers (1998)
programme.desc: A hi-tech computer chip has a bizarre effect on a squad of toy soldiers, causing mayhem for their owner as the miniature marauders engage in a series of scaled-down skirmishes. Children's adventure mixing live action and computer animation, starring Kirsten Dunst, Denis Leary and Gregory Smith, with the voices of Tommy Lee Jones, Frank Langella, Sarah Michelle Gellar and Christina Ricci(n)

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton(n)

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War (2016)
programme.desc: Eric and fellow warrior Sara, raised as members of ice Queen Freya's army, try to conceal their forbidden love as they fight to survive the wicked intentions of both Freya and her sister Ravenna. However, as war between the siblings escalates, Eric and Sara unite with Freya in an attempt to end Ravenna's wicked reign once and for all. Fantasy adventure, starring Chris Hemsworth, Charlize Theron, Emily Blunt and Jessica Chastain(n)

programme.title: The Last Stand (2013)
programme.desc: Disgraced narcotics cop Ray Owens retires into a quiet life as sheriff of a small town on the Mexican border. He gets the chance to prove his worth as a law enforcer when a drug lord escapes from prison and tries to flee the US - with his escape route taking him through Ray's jurisdiction. Action thriller, starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker(n)

programme.title: Brotherhood (2016)
programme.desc: Sam Peel is now married to lawyer Kayla, with whom he's raising two children, and is determined to stay out of trouble, but he is blackmailed into returning to the criminal underworld. Drama sequel concluding the Hood trilogy, written, directed by and starring Noel Clarke(n)

programme.title: What Richard Did (2012)
programme.desc: A wealthy teenager manages to seduce another student's girlfriend, but his confidence is shaken by her continuing friendship with her ex. His insecurity results in a violent confrontation that has unforeseen consequences, and leads to his seemingly charmed life rapidly falling apart. Drama, starring Jack Reynor and Roisin Murphy(n)

programme.title: BSL Zone
programme.desc: Punk Chef shows how to rustle up delicious yet healthy dishes(n)

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter (1964)
programme.desc: A Civil War veteran returns home to find a ruthless landowner has sold the family house and his land has been confiscated as so-called enemy property. When the soldier retaliates by breaking into his former home and barricading himself in, the land baron hires a mysterious gunslinger to force the rebel out - but once unleashed, the hired gun has ideas of his own. Western, starring Yul Brynner, George Segal, Janice Rule and Pat Hingle(n)

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams(n)

programme.title: Robinson Crusoe on Mars (1964)
programme.desc: Stranded on Mars with only a monkey as a companion, an astronaut has to quickly figure out how to survive a lack of oxygen, food and water on the lifeless planet. Sci-fi drama, inspired by Daniel Defoe's classic tale, starring Paul Mantee, Adam West and Victor Lundin(n)

programme.title: The Black Tent (1956)
programme.desc: A wounded British Army captain is saved by a tribe of nomads in the Libyan desert during the Second World War, and they take him to their camp, where he is cared for by the sheikh's daughter and falls in love with her. Romantic drama, with Anthony Steel, Anna-Maria Sandri, Donald Sinden, Andre Morell and Donald Pleasence(n)

programme.title: GI Joe: The Rise of Cobra (2009)
programme.desc: When a powerful experimental weapon is snatched by a mysterious terrorist organisation, two of the soldiers guarding it are recruited into a top-secret military strike force. As they go in search of the stolen technology, they uncover a plot by its creator to take over the world. Action adventure, with Channing Tatum, Sienna Miller and Christopher Eccleston(n)

programme.title: The Girl on the Train (2016)
programme.desc: Having lost her job and her husband, alcoholic Rachel Watson spends time aimlessly travelling on a train. She gets drawn into a web of intrigue when she becomes fascinated by a woman's disappearance. Rachel thinks she has vital evidence in cracking the case, but gaps in her memory cloud her judgment, and before long her own life is endangered. Thriller based on Paula Hawkins' novel, starring Emily Blunt, Rebecca Ferguson, Haley Bennett, Justin Theroux and Luke Evans(n)

programme.title: Berlin Syndrome (2017)
programme.desc: After a one-night stand with a man in Berlin, an Australian photographer wakes up to discover that he has imprisoned her in his flat. Horror, starring Teresa Palmer(n)

programme.title: Lovelace (2013)
programme.desc: Biopic of 1970s adult film star Linda Lovelace, contrasting her glamorous reputation following the release of groundbreaking adult movie Deep Throat - which made her an international star - to the dark account of exploitation and abuse she revealed to the world years later. Starring Amanda Seyfried, Peter Sarsgaard, Sharon Stone and Robert Patrick(n)

programme.title: 12 Angry Men (1957)
programme.desc: Twelve jurors convene to decide the verdict in a murder trial. While 11 of the group are thoroughly convinced the teenage defendant is guilty, one lone voice of reason refuses to cave in to pressure and passionately argues the case for his innocence. Sidney Lumet's legal drama, starring Henry Fonda, Lee J Cobb, Ed Begley, Martin Balsam and Jack Klugman(n)

programme.title: The Professionals (1966)
programme.desc: A wealthy Texan hires four mercenaries to rescue his wife, who has been abducted and taken to Mexico by a bandit gang. However, when they find her, she refuses to leave and they have to take her by force - ending in a cross-border chase with the outlaws on their trail. Western adventure, with Burt Lancaster, Lee Marvin, Robert Ryan, Woody Strode, Jack Palance and Claudia Cardinale(n)

programme.title: The Million Pound Note (1954)
programme.desc: An eccentric multimillionaire bets his equally rich brother that if a man is known to be wealthy, he can obtain everything he needs on credit. To put this theory to the test, they give a £1million note to a penniless seaman, but instruct him never to spend it. Comedy adapted from a story by Mark Twain, starring Gregory Peck, Jane Griffiths, Joyce Grenfell and Wilfrid Hyde White(n)

programme.title: The Tin Star (1957)
programme.desc: A world-weary bounty hunter, formerly a sheriff, arrives in a small town where a newly-appointed lawman is struggling to keep the peace. When he learns of the mercenary's past, the inexperienced lawman seeks his help in learning the tricks of the trade so he can bring an outlaw gang to justice. Anthony Mann's Western, starring Henry Fonda, Anthony Perkins, Lee Van Cleef, Betsy Palmer and Michel Ray(n)

programme.title: Percy Jackson: Sea of Monsters (2013)
programme.desc: The modern-day teenage son of the Greek god Poseidon must lead his friends on a perilous journey into the Bermuda triangle. They need to recover the legendary Golden Fleece to save the world, but getting to it means braving all manner of terrifying monsters. Fantasy adventure sequel, starring Logan Lerman and Alexandra Daddario(n)

programme.title: Stratton (2017)
programme.desc: A British Special Boat Service commando tracks down an international terrorist cell. Thriller, starring Dominic Cooper, Austin Stowell and Gemma Chan(n)

programme.title: Sisters (2015)
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters are reunited when their parents decide to sell the house they grew up in. They return to the family home to clear out their childhood bedrooms, but with their parents away, seize the chance to relive their teenage years and throw one last wild house party. Comedy, starring Amy Poehler, Tina Fey and Dianne Wiest(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. As the villagers celebrate New Year's Eve at Nancy's party at The Hutch, there's also a look ahead to events unfolding at New Year's Eve 2020(n)

programme.title: Rugrats Go Wild (2003)
programme.desc: A leaky boat leaves the precocious youngsters stranded on a jungle island, but their luck changes when explorers the Wild Thornberrys come to their rescue. However, Thornberry dad Nigel loses his memory, so it falls to his daughter Eliza to save the day. Back in Britain, George meets a man turning a wrecked private jet into a crash pad and a Gypsy tattoo artist with big plans for an old railway carriage. George also challenges his pal, craftsman Will Hardie, to create a woodland retreat for less than the price of a family holiday(n)

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George is joined by leading architects to help transform some of Britain's most unloved houses into desirable properties, beginning with the 1970s home of Tony and Sarah in the Vale of Glamorgan. The couple want rid of the pebbledash facade, small windows and dated decor, to create a great family home on a relatively modest budget of £60,000. They receive some bespoke and cutting-edge input from commercial and residential architect Greg Blee, with a plan that will link their home to the landscape beyond, including a Shard-like extension(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first host in Bournemouth, 38-year-old bar manager and musician Adie, hopes to hit the right notes by ensuring his night of laid back fun is full of music and laughter. With trumpets and drums at the ready and tricky crustaceans proving hard to crack, does Adie have what it takes to win the £1,000 prize?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second Bournemouth host is aristocratic vet Sir Henry, who plans to charm his way to the prize by hosting an evening of relaxed dining(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Countryside-loving Pippa from Bournemouth hopes to impress her guests by throwing a dinner party with every course inspired by fish(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Bournemouth, spiritual student Simone hopes to wow her guests with a spicy Bajan menu. She's keen to impress her new friend, posh vet Sir Henry, but she's unsure about Pippa, who doesn't hold back as she probes Simone about her student house(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the last night in Bournemouth, flamboyant charity manager Jacqueline hopes that Michelin star-style food will win her the prize. With partridge and black pudding scotch eggs, this could be a culinary night to remember, but will Sir Henry and Simone steal her thunder with an unlikely romance?(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition starts at the Shoes in Durham, where landlord Billy Gowland and partner Debbie Nelson hope their footwear-themed pub and B&B is the right fit for their guests(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Biggin Hall Hotel in Derbyshire, owner James Moffat and partner Annie Larner hope the B&Bers will fall for the rural charm of their 17th-century farmhouse(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: For the third visit the group head to Forest Garden Shovelstrode in East Sussex, where hosts Charles and Lisa Hooper hope the guests buy into their woodland retreat(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mother and son Fiona and James Milligan welcome the guests to Derby Manor Hotel and Restaurant in Bournemouth, where the ostentatious decor gets mixed reactions(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners find out what they have been paid and settle some scores. The Shoes is up first and hosts Billy Gowland and his partner Debbie Nelson find out if their budget rooms have proved too basic for the group. Next, James Moffat and his partner Annie Larner from Biggin Hall Hotel want to clear up their issues with Billy and Debbie. As the third hosts, Charles and Lisa Hooper from yurt glamp-site Forest Garden Shovelstrode confront their low scores from James. Finally, Fiona and James from the Derby Manor Hotel and Restaurant make accusations of nitpicking and double standards(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Swansea, performing arts director Anthony plans a theatre-themed menu for his guests, Ross, Tula, Kola and Julie. However, straight-talking Tula tries to steal the show with a candid revelation and Julie brings the house down with some frisky fun at Kola's expense. Anthony's plans go awry in the kitchen, threatening to earn him more rotten earn tomatoes than rave reviews(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Salesman Ross hosts the second party from Swansea, but his guests make a discovery that leaves him with some explaining to do, while tension erupts between him and Kola(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Social carer Kola provides plenty of hip-hop swagger on the third day of the contest in Swansea, with a Nigerian menu he hopes will both educate and impress his fellow diners(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Triathlete Tula serves a Spanish-themed menu in Swansea, hoping charm and chorizo can smooth over the dispute between Ross and Julie and avoid a punch-up over the paella(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Social worker Julie plans a chilled out slumber party for the final night of the week in Swansea. She cooks a homely menu, but struggles with the pronunciation as well as the preparation of some of her ingredients. At the end of another eventful evening, the winner of the £1,000 prize is revealed(n)

programme.title: The World's Wildest Weather
programme.desc: Footage shot by members of the public of unusual and dangerous weather from around the world, including Alpine avalanches and cyclones in the South Pacific. The programme features first-hand accounts of the events featured and scientific analysis of the footage and how the strange weather conditions came about(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A crew races to a skydiver suffering serious injuries after smashing into a house, while a biker in Berkshire is trapped with multiple injuries after ploughing into a road sign.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Twenty-five-year-old Billy arrives at St George's by helicopter after being involved in a motorcycle accident in which a van ran over his chest. The team work quickly to get him into CT to see if he has any life-changing injuries, while his girlfriend, mum and stepdad desperately try to get to the hospital. Meanwhile, 58-year-old Stephen comes into A&E with his wife and son after showing signs of a stroke, and Milly brings her two-year-old son Freddie in after he jammed his thumb in a door(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Paramedics across Britain treat patients fighting for their lives. In Nottingham, Selina Conway is dispatched to a 76-year-old man who has collapsed in his garden, while Liam Wakefield heads to the home of an 18-year-old who has stopped breathing. In Essex, Sadie Bentley and recently qualified Anna Tansley are called by the coastguard to help resuscitate a man found floating in the sea(n)

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: A family trip to the Cincinnati Zoo turns into chaos and horror as a three-year-old falls into the enclosure of Harambe, the silverback gorilla(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A crew races to a skydiver suffering serious injuries after smashing into a house, while a biker in Berkshire is trapped with multiple injuries after ploughing into a road sign.(n)

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: Paramedics across Britain treat patients fighting for their lives. In Nottingham, Selina Conway is dispatched to a 76-year-old man who has collapsed in his garden, while Liam Wakefield heads to the home of an 18-year-old who has stopped breathing. In Essex, Sadie Bentley and recently qualified Anna Tansley are called by the coastguard to help resuscitate a man found floating in the sea(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations, with Jimmy Doherty heading to South Africa on the trail of sweet piquante peppers and visits the company that has exclusive rights to grow, process and market these colourful chillies. Kate Quilton is in Hawaii to investigate the potentially dangerous levels of mercury in tuna, and Matt Tebbutt finds out why the bags of ice cubes in supermarkets are so crystal clear(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Birmingham pair Derek Hansel and Gina Awoko are looking for a home in Almeria, Spain, that they can eventually retire to and also generate some rental income from. Jasmine Harman shows them a range of properties within their £300,000 budget, from a coastal renovation project to an inland cortijo. However, it remains to be seen whether she can deliver the perfect property in the perfect location(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Recently retired couple Nick and Jane Purser are looking forward to settling down, but cannot decide where that should be. Jane's mother lives in Liverpool, so she would prefer to stay close by with a move to Lancaster. Nick wants them to move to southern France, where he can ride his motorbike in the sun. Jasmine Harman shows the pair three properties in Lancaster for up to £180,000 and Jonnie Irwin tempts them with three properties for up to £145,000 in France(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The 2019 edition of the culinary competition begins with cake week and the first stage challenge features a fruit cake, while the technical is a retro classic that requires intricate decoration. Finally, for the showstopper, the contestants must create the birthday cake they wish they had received as a child. Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig present, with Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith doing the judging(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel across the UK to find unique and valuable items languishing in people's homes and use creative thinking and elbow grease to fix them up to turn a profit for their owners. Here they unearth a church pew, create a fish tank from scrap and uncover a special petrol tank(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in East Sussex and Hertfordshire, with finds that include a Victorian egg incubator(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at Wharfe House in Wetherby, run by B&B newcomer Pauline Cox, who's joined by her best friend Claire Smith. Eyebrows are raised when Mike and Karen Hepker arrive from Bath Lodge Castle in a chauffeur-driven car. During a visit to a local vineyard, sparks fly between Mike Hepker and Tash Thorne, who runs The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport with her partner Mike Pearce. Having only just opened, Pauline has a house full for the very first time. The narrow antique beds cause concerns and Jenny and Clive Aylett from Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk are first to criticise breakfast. When it comes to feedback, Pauline's left deflated by her sausage scores - and Karen and Mike Hepker vote with their feet(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners visit Wortwell Hall Barn in Norfolk, run by husband-and-wife duo Clive and Jenny Aylett, but when the pair's rivals arrive, Pauline Cox and Claire Smith have difficulty locating their favourite appliance. Publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne are astonished to discover they cannot lock their room's door. In the morning, some of the guest make awkward requests to change their breakfast orders, causing professional chef Clive to experience a meltdown in the kitchen that leads to a fundamental error(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to Bath Lodge Castle in Somerset for the third day of the competition, where they are wowed by Karen and Mike Hepker's luxury castle experience. Although the guests are disappointed at the bathroom fixtures and fittings, they are given the chance to vent their emotions during an afternoon of painting in the castle grounds. Plus, tensions rise between Mike and Tash at dinner, and harsh comments at feedback lead the hosts to suspect game playing(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to The Old Lodge Hotel in Gosport, Hampshire, run by publicans Mike Pearce and Tash Thorne. Karen Hepker is disappointed with the honeymoon suite, while Clive and Jenny Aylett find a dubious looking splash guard in the shower. A boat tour backfires when Jenny struggles with her water phobia and at dinner Karen takes the opportunity to tell the others exactly what she thinks of them. But things really kick off when it comes to feedback time(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Wharfe House hosts Pauline Cox and Claire Smith begin a bitter debate, demanding to know why their beds caused such a sleepless night. Accusations subsequently fly in all directions and walk-outs look on the cards as tensions mount leading to the payments being revealed(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the hidden lives of the animals of Chester Zoo. The Asian elephant family welcome a new arrival. Grumpy matriarch Thi has been pregnant for almost two years and is reaching the end of her tether. She's given birth to a stillborn baby in the past, so the keepers have a close eye on her. Cameras also follow Red panda Jung, who has been getting the cold shoulder from his partner Nima since they had two cubs(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Lindleys from Ashtead, Surrey. Having built up his business empire from home, cyber security expert Bill has inadvertently taken over their detached bungalow, and retired civil servant Pippa has had enough. She dreams of moving to Kent, where they can be closer to family and the coast(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Countdown
programme.desc: Chris Packham takes on Charlotte Hawkins in the words and numbers game. Jo Brand is with Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, and Rachel Riley in charge of the numbers(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Two-and-a-half years have passed since Dick and Angel Strawbridge swapped their flat in Southend for a 19th-century chateau in France costing only £280,000, and in that time, the pair have worked to transform the derelict property into a fairytale castle. However, around half of the 45 rooms are yet to receive adequate attention, the couple's fledgling events business demands attention, and the outbuildings are still in need of conversion(n)

programme.title: Ugly House to Lovely House with George Clarke
programme.desc: George visits Lucas and Hayley, whose bland and boxy 1970s four-bedroom home sticks out like a sore thumb among the period properties of Saffron Walden, Essex. To make matters worse, some 1980s interior additions have added insult to injury - and the double garage at the side is next to useless. Enter architect Chris Dyson to bring the property bang up to date. But will Lucas and Hayley be happy with his radical plans?(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-one-year-old Mark is brought in after coming off his bike and doctors are concerned he may have suffered life-changing damage to his spine, with wife Karen rushing to be by his side. Ten-year-old Aiden comes to paediatrics with his mum and her girlfriend Lorraine, after hurting his foot on the monkey bars at school(n)

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: A crew races to a skydiver suffering serious injuries after smashing into a house, while a biker in Berkshire is trapped with multiple injuries after ploughing into a road sign.(n)

programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and Roisin Conaty compete against Jon Richardson and Nish Kumar. Adam Buxton joins the show's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Fifty-one-year-old Mark is brought in after coming off his bike and doctors are concerned he may have suffered life-changing damage to his spine, with wife Karen rushing to be by his side. Ten-year-old Aiden comes to paediatrics with his mum and her girlfriend Lorraine, after hurting his foot on the monkey bars at school(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part edition, Gordon Ramsay heads to La Galleria 33 in Boston, Massachusetts, an Italian restaurant run by sisters Rita and Lisa. The pair grew up working at their father's eatery nearby, but when they opened their own business, they couldn't replicate his success, and they now blame their failure on everything from the weather to the tablecloths(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Another selection of favourite investigations from the team. Jimmy Doherty hears about a threat to British juniper berries that could mark the end of gin's recent resurgence in popularity, while Kate Quilton delves into the contents of herbal bedtime teas to establish if they really can help people get to sleep more easily. Big oyster fan Matt Tebbutt wonders why he never finds pearls in his seafood platters so sets off for China, where he discovers that pearl production is full of surprises(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: When her partner of 20 years died, Ginny Lunn decided to find a holiday home where she could create new memories. Torn between buying a place in Dorset within easy reach of her London home for a budget of £250,000, and the Costa Tropical in Spain, where she would have a budget of £150,000, she requires help. Jasmine Harman shows her three options in Dorset, and Laura Hamilton tries to impress her with three properties in Spain, but, with the help of her sister Sara, which one will Ginny choose?(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton shows Juliette and Jonathan Cottam three homes in the Dordogne region of France, and Jasmine Harman tries to tempt them with three properties in Devon(n)

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host the second round of the culinary competition, which this time focuses on biscuits. For the signature round, the contestants must concoct a luxurious chocolate-coated bake. The technical challenge is a nostalgic one for Paul Hollywood, who asks the contestants to prepare a snack that was a favourite of his father's. Finally, the showstopper round requires the bakers to rise to an eye-catching challenge that is designed to test which of them will snap under the pressure(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien travel to the West Midlands and London, where finds include a potato oven and an old petrol pump(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at North Bridge Street B&B in Hawick in the Scottish Borders, which is run by Eileen Walsh and her Portuguese partner Emanuel Forte. When the guests arrive, the purple-themed rooms cause a reaction, while one competitor's constant criticising irritates another(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at the Golden Fleece in Ruleholme, Cumbria, run by chef Robert Cowan and his partner, Sylvia Spark. Before long, guests Eileen and Emmanuel pick up on cleanliness issues, and breakfast proves to be a disappointment(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Bubble Inn in Stenson, Derbyshire for the third day of the competition, where unsightly stains and security leave some of them less than impressed. Manager and ex-semi-professional boxer Connie Eleftheriou is keen to take his rivals in the ring with him, however the real damage happens when Emmanuel is taken to hospital after some overenthusiastic dancing at a Greek-themed night(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Melinda Beckett-Hughes is the final host of the week at Ayuda House in Greater Manchester - and as she has spent the week picking fault, the guests expect perfection from her. However, Robert and Sylvia are shocked to find a dirty towel in a drawer, while Emmanuel and Eileen cannot believe the levels of dust and Connie is horrified by the carpet(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some old scores. Eileen and Emmanuel from North Bridge Street want to get to the bottom of Melinda and Stewart's dirty bin comments as well as challenging Melinda's shower issues. Robert and Sylvia from the Golden Fleece try to defend their breakfast disaster, but also pull Eileen and Emmanuel up on their low score(n)

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Chester's Penguin Island is home to one of the most enduring love stories in the zoo. At 22, Rud is the oldest on the island, and has been with his partner, Spike, for over 15 years. However, keepers are concerned that Rud's arthritic hip could be affecting his quality of life. Meanwhile, the Sumatran tigers are upgrading to a luxury new enclosure on the other side of the zoo as part of Chester's huge expansion. But they've lived in their home for most of their lives so it's not going to be an easy move(n)

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet newlyweds Nikki and Andy Taylor-Myers in Northampton, who have recently merged households and are unhappy in their cluttered terrace. Property services manager Andy is desperate to stay in their home, but drama and support teacher Nikki has reached boiling point and wants a fresh start(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Countdown
programme.desc: Stuart Maconie takes on James O'Brien, with special guest Rufus Hound joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner and Rachel Riley in charge of the numbers(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Dick gets to work on the walled garden in the spring and buys a mini tractor for the job - but it may not fit through the gate. Angel designs another suite, with black walls and mosaic mirrors, and decorates the entire dining room with blossoms so a guest can make a special wedding proposal. The couple also consider the possibility of truffle farming(n)

programme.title: Guy Martin's Spitfire
programme.desc: In May 1940, a Mark 1 Spitfire was shot down and crash-landed on a beach in northern France, where it slowly sank into the sand. The wreckage was finally recovered in the 1980s and stored in France for more than 20 years. In this programme, motorcycle racer and mechanic Guy Martin joins a two-year project to rebuild the aeroplane, revealing the engineering and skills involved, and providing a fitting homage to the bravery of everyone involved in its service(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Three boys are admitted for very different reasons, including cyclist Ollie, who arrives with head, neck and facial injuries having been involved in a traffic accident. Cameras also follow Dominic, another 16 year old. He was recovering at home after having his tonsils out when his throat started bleeding and he had to go to hospital(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the popular quiz as Sean Lock and David O'Doherty compete against Jon Richardson and Natasia Demetriou. John Kearns joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Tomorrow's World
programme.desc: Hosts present their views and opinions on the Bible's answers to the most important questions(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A motocross rider is killed while making a film at a local track, and Dr Sloan suspects sabotage may account for the air of tension hanging over the set(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr Sloan is arrested for the murder of Gordon Ganza, a Mob boss suspected of ordering an attempt on Steve's life. Feature-length episode, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Part two of two. Steve races to prove his father's innocence by finding the real culprit in the Ganza murder, convinced Malcolm Trainor is the man responsible for the crime. Medical detective drama, starring Barry and Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A nursing administrator is found dead during a hospital emergency drill - and an eccentric artist proves to be the only witness. Medical detective drama, guest starring Elliott Gould, Loretta Swit, Sally Kellerman, William Christopher and Jamie Farr(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A girl accidentally kills her fiance just before Dr Sloan arrives at the house for a dinner party - and to make matters worse, the body promptly disappears(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A fire crew discovers a man's body after putting out a raging blaze at a warehouse belonging to a Navy-contracted electronics company, and Gibbs recognises the victim as Carter Plimpton - a former member of an NCIS black-ops unit. Meanwhile, a member of the Baltimore police department helping with the case appears to have a grudge against Tony(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team's mission to track the arsonist targeting US Navy facilities appears to end in success when the man in question is killed by a thermite explosion on board the USS Brewer. Meanwhile, Abby studies evidence relating to fire-starter Bruce Johnson, who died when his car exploded, and discovers coded messages in his quarters that indicate he may have been working as part of a larger gang. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The investigators discover probationary agent Ned Dorneget has been bugged by Harper Dearing, the man behind a spate of arson attacks on US Navy vessels. A phone call from the man himself makes it clear he is out for revenge, and Sam Ryan has information as to the motive behind it. Guest starring Richard Schiff (The West Wing)(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team tries to track down wanted terrorist Harper Dearing before another US Navy ship is destroyed, and a desperate Gibbs enlists the aid of a prisoner to draw his target out of hiding. Meanwhile, Palmer is forced to consider putting his nuptials on hold as the stand-off with Dearing becomes heated. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs discovers a link between the murder of a petty officer and the break-up of his team, leading him and new director Leon Vance to uncover a case of blackmail involving an NCIS agent. The duo single out three suspects, but learn vital information has been stolen, and realise the whole Persian Gulf Fleet could be in danger(n)

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm is called to prosecute a CPO for the murder of his wife's paramour. On the other side of the bench, Mac tries to prove his story that despite a history of physical abuse, the accused is not a murderer. Drama, starring David James Elliott(n)

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate the murder of a naval pilot whose body was found on board a decommissioned aircraft carrier. In the course of their inquiries, they come across a list of MIAs and PoWs being held in Russia - which includes a familiar name(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo investigates a murder at the military academy he once attended, after a murdered marine and alumni of the school is found clutching a photo of a current student. Meanwhile, Bishop and her husband invite the team out for a special dinner. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team suspects Gibbs's arch-nemesis is behind an explosion at a summit on global terror. Meanwhile, a grief-stricken Fornell struggles to deal with the fatal shooting of his ex-wife. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Pauley Perrette and Joe Spano(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A covert identity created for one of Gibbs' undercover cases 20 years previously resurfaces after a murder victim is found to be using the alias. Meanwhile, Bishop becomes anxious at the thought of having to work incognito in the future. Starring Mark Harmon and Emily Wickersham(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A US Navy lieutenant is murdered at the Defence Logistics Agency, while visitings the office of an admiral currently away at sea. As the team investigates the scene of the crime, they realise a rare painting found in the admiral's office is actually an elaborate fake placed there after the killing, replacing the stolen original. As the quest to locate the missing artwork gets under way, the agents realise they need the help of an expert. Luckily, Tony's con-artist father has returned to town, having broken up with his fiancee, and is on hand to provide expert advice as the hunt for the killer takes them into the shady world of the black market. Guest starring Robert Wagner(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is murdered at the home of Gunnery Sergeant Holt Perkins, and while the victim is initially assumed to be the marine's wife, analysis reveals her to be a convicted thief, presumed to be on the scene as part of a plot to hit Perkins' house. When the agents discover the calling card of notorious terror cell Dragon's Tooth on the body, it becomes clear the murder has been committed as part of a wider agenda, and the team joins forces with the Department of Defence to catch the killer. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Cote de Pablo and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Red Troop members are dispatched to a former Soviet state in a race to save the kidnapped daughters of a British diplomat. Military drama, starring Ross Kemp(n)

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: With Perry away, entertainment lawyer Bruce Jason represents a Balkan political refugee accused of murder, but the man is convinced Jason is a former spy.(n)

programme.title: The High Chaparral
programme.desc: A new hand earns the respect of everyone on the ranch, but his criminal past soon catches up with him(n)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF team pursues a powerful businessman who is dictating the prices of food(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A man holds an antenatal class hostage, and the expectant mothers all start going into labour. Fortunately, Dr Sloan is on hand to resolve matters. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three talk-show hosts housed in the same studio devise bizarre and outlandish pranks as they vie for ratings, but the tragic result of one joke turns out to be no laughing matter. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The attorney defends a woman accused of murdering a writer whose work has destroyed the career of several politicians(n)

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: The wife of an eccentric sculptor is accused of murder, but further investigation reveals a case of double blackmail(n)

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex is wounded at Kim and Phil's wedding. Adventure with the modern-day lawman whose crime-solving methods are rooted firmly in the Old West(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The body of a politician is found in an empty house, leading the team to investigate whether he was killed as a consequence of his corrupt policies that led to local residents being forced out of their homes. Crime drama, starring David Caruso, Emily Procter and Adam Rodriguez(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A lieutenant apparently commits suicide by jumping from an aircraft carrier and Ziva and McGee are dispatched to inform the widow - but arrive to find that she has been killed. Subsequent inquiries reveal that the injuries on her body were inflicted after death and the murder scene was carefully staged to mislead investigators. programme.title: NCIS

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: A flash rip sweeps dozens of swimmers out of the flags and into deep water. Lifeguards are overwhelmed by the mass rescue, and one man is dragged unconscious from the water. With the treacherous conditions, Hoppo makes the call to pull the flags down and close the beach. Thousands of swimmers crowd the shoreline and in the simmering tension a fight breaks out. The crowd mobs lifeguards treating a spinal as rescues continue in the water(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Jim's gambling habit looks like it's about to be exposed when he's spotted at a dog track by Steve and Honey, while Terry arrests his own brother on a trumped-up charge, determined to discover whether he's really abusing his sons. Elsewhere, an act of vandalism at a church leads Tony to a wholly unexpected encounter with another of the Radford boys - has this scion of the notorious crime family really become a man of the cloth?(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Terry is beside himself with worry about his nephews' safety, convinced they are being abused by his brother, and jeopardises the case to help them. Meadows attends the funeral of former colleague Ted Roach, and is drawn into investigating the suspicious circumstances surrounding his death, helped by ex-coppers Bob Cryer and Alec Peters. Questioning his own mortality in the process, he wonders whether a quieter pace of life would suit him better, but soon realises he would miss the thrill of the job and sets off home in a more positive mood - until he gets a shooting pain down his arm(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Neil speedily steps into a convalescing Jack Meadows' shoes, much to the dismay of Debbie McAllister, who takes a dim view of his unseemly haste to take over. Rob organises a disastrous raid on the Radfords' club, while Samantha receives a video of missing daughter Abi, belatedly bringing Phil Hunter round to the view that the youngster has been kidnapped(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Gina orders Kerry to sever her ties with the Radford family or leave the Met. The Sun Hill sniper claims another victim, raising fears that he's being fed information by a police insider - or may actually work at the station. Behind the scenes, Gabriel gleefully seizes an opportunity to cause renewed friction between Jim and June(n)

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Patricia Routledge stars as Lancashire housewife Hetty Wainthropp, a part-time Post Office worker with a sideline in sleuthing. In this first episode, the mysterious death of a pensioner leaves a few unanswered questions, but Hetty smells a rat and with her young assistant Geoffrey, sets about solving the mystery the police have little interest in. Drama, also starring Dominic Monaghan and David Benfield(n)

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: Hetty and amiable sidekick Geoffrey become embroiled in a convoluted case involving a deaf birdwatcher who goes missing at the same time as a woman's body is found at the bottom of a cliff he is known to frequent. Light-hearted drama, with Patricia Routledge and Dominic Monaghan, featuring a guest appearance by David Bower(n)

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: The owners of a Tuscan inn are sent a severed finger and a photo of their son. Convinced he has been kidnapped by the Mafia, their daughter hires Hetty while she and Robert are on holiday(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Boxing Day sees heavy snowfall covering the country and the adverse weather causes major disruption across Poplar as roads become blocked and pipes freeze meaning families have to queue outside for water from standpipes. Sister Julienne must inform a family about the death of their loved one and uncovers an uncomfortable truth, while Valerie helps an unmarried couple living in a caravan prepare for their baby, but unforeseen complications knock her confidence in her ability as a midwife. Guest starring Anita Dobson(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives move into their new premises following the explosion that wrecked the old Nonnatus House, and are joined by fresh arrival Sister Winifred - a kindly-but-naive young woman. Jenny becomes concerned about new mother Merle's mental state and the welfare of her baby, who isn't feeding properly. Dr Turner believes it could be something more serious - although the mystery is eventually solved by the last person anyone would have expected. Chummy is struggling to adjust to her new role as a housewife and mother, and organises an open day at the community centre. Jessica Raine, Stephen McGann and Miranda Hart star(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Trixie's feathers are ruffled when Jenny is promoted, but the new Acting Sister has more to worry about after a mother-to-be reveals the baby she is carrying was not fathered by her husband - and to complicate matters, the real father is black. Cynthia is inspired by a lecture on natural childbirth, convinced it will help an overly anxious patient, while Alec and his friends try to persuade Jenny to join them on a CND march. Jessica Raine, Helen George and Bryony Hannah star in the 1950s-set nursing drama(n)

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: A reluctant Brian enters an addiction centre run by monks to treat his alcoholism, but soon becomes bored and looks for a distraction. He finds one when a chance remark leads the team to reopen an investigation into the death of a heroin user nine years previously - and to help reveal the truth, Gerry is sent undercover as a sex addict. Richard Wilson and Fay Ripley guest star(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Nikki struggles to come to terms with life back home and seeks out fellow pathologist Sally Vaughan for support, only to learn she is nowhere to be found. National Crime Agency investigator Guy Bernhardt asks Nikki to help him by employing pathologist David Cannon, the chief suspect in Sally's disappearance. As Jack, Clarissa and Thomas share concerns about Nikki's wellbeing, a body found in a reservoir is linked to a murder case from 16 years previously. Return of the crime drama, starring Emilia Fox, with Julian Rhind-Tutt and Alex Macqueen(n)

programme.title: Waking the Dead
programme.desc: Boyd is unsettled when Sarah Cavendish (played by Five Daughters star Eva Birthistle), an officer of equal rank to him, joins the team to investigate the disappearance of a banker who had been struggling to cope with losing his daughter to cancer. Though Cavendish's professional skills quickly prove to be a major asset, her new colleagues discover that a failed operation from earlier in her career is continuing to haunt her, and become concerned for her welfare. Trevor Eve stars in the first of a two-part story kicking off the final series of the crime drama, with Sue Johnston and Tara Fitzgerald(n)

programme.title: Wallander
programme.desc: Kenneth Branagh returns to his Bafta-winning role of the Swedish detective in three adaptations of stories by Henning Mankell. Wallander moves into a new home with his girlfriend, only for their dreams of domestic bliss to be shattered when they discover a skeleton in the garden. He must find the killer if he has any hopes of getting his life settled again - and is surprised to discover the body was buried more recently than he first thought. Saskia Reeves and Sarah Smart co-star(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Another mystery for the cops on the Caribbean island of Saint Marie, where the sun shines all day and it seems half the residents are killers-in-waiting. However, it's all change for the team. Last week they waved goodbye to Humphrey Goodman. No one knows how Kris Marshall's character is bowing out of the show - will he walk off into the sunset with new love Martha, or will he meet a sticky end, like his predecessor Richard Poole (Ben Miller)? What we do know is that in his place is Ardal O'Hanlon as DI Jack Mooney, who first popped up in the two-part London special. His first Caribbean case sees the reopening of a seven-year-old murder when a tourist provides an alibi for the woman convicted of the crime(n)

programme.desc: The discovery of a Roman sword with traces of blood on it is linked to an unidentified, headless corpse found near Heathrow in March 2008. They are helped in their investigation by anthropologist Fiona Kennedy, for whom Dan begins to develop feelings - just as he is told his wife might be discharged from the secure hospital where she has spent the past several years. programme.title: Match of the Day: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Gabby Logan presents action from the third-round fixtures, including Manchester City v Port Vale at the Etihad Stadium and Wolverhampton Wanderers v Manchester United at Molineux. Holders City hadn't faced the Valiants since October 1999, and were heavy favourites to progress against their League Two opponents. Wolves overcame United at the quarter-final stage last season, winning 2-1 on this ground thanks to second-half goals from Raul Jiminez and Diogo Jota. Plus, highlights of Rochdale or Boston United v Newcastle United, Bristol City v Shrewsbury Town, Millwall v Newport County, Rotherham United v Hull City, Burnley v Peterborough United, Birmingham City v Blackburn Rovers, Fulham v Aston Villa, Cardiff City v Forest Green Rovers or Carlisle United, Oxford United v Exeter City or Hartlepool United, Southampton v Huddersfield Town, Brighton & Hove Albion v Sheffield Wednesday, Bristol Rovers or Plymouth Argyle v Coventry City or Ipswich Town, Reading v Blackpool, Watford v Tranmere(n)

programme.title: The Andrew Marr Show
programme.desc: A round-up of the week's stories, featuring interviews with key figures in politics and current affairs and a round-up of the Sunday papers. Including news and weather at 10.00(n)

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A revisit to an impressive project at large Grade II listed building in Rochester, kent. The team also explore properties in Mountain Ash, South Wales, and Birmingham(n)

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: Lindy MacEwan thinks New Zealand could give her the fresh start she wants, but husband Steve has reservations, so they take their children down under for a trial week(n)

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin and Thomas Plant offer their expert assistance to two teams scouring Kingston upon Thames seeking keenly priced items to take to auction in an effort to maximise their profits against each other. Host Charlie Ross observes their progress and also finds a piece of vintage tea advertising that might well be worth a packet(n)

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: The Rev Kate Bottley is in Bristol to explore how Methodist Church founder John Wesley devised a service that still helps many Christians mark the new year(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a couple who are journalists find a home in Devon with holiday let potential on a budget of £700,000. Away from the hunt, he meets a young sheep farmer(n)

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: Footage of marine life in different environments around the north, beginning with a tropical coral reef which has medicinal properties for dolphins, and is used as a tool by tusk fish. In Japan, a shipwreck is home to the Asian sheepshead wrasse, which can change gender, while in the polar north, walruses struggle to find ice floes for their pups to rest on as climate change takes its toll on the environment(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day Live: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Liverpool v Everton (Kick-off 4.01pm). Gary Lineker presents coverage of the third-round clash between the Merseyside rivals, which takes place at Anfield. These sides met on this ground in the Premier League last month, with the Reds prevailing 5-2 in what proved to be Marco Silva's final game in charge of the Toffees. The teams last played each other in the FA Cup at this same stage two years ago, and Jurgen Klopp's men also emerged victorious on that occasion, albeit by a closer 2-1 scoreline. Defender Virgil van Dijk scored the winner on his debut, following a £75million move from Southampton a matter of days beforehand(n)

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: A compilation programme championing cottage industries, with Ellie Harrison meeting a Herefordshire woman who sells hand-crafted products all revolving around fire(n)

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Part two of two. A terrifying plan to destroy humanity is about to reach fruition. Can the Doctor and her companions escape multiple traps and defeat a deadly alliance? Jodie Whittaker, Tosin Cole, Bradley Walsh and Mandip Gill star(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The return of the period drama about midwives and nurses in London's East End, picking up the story in January 1965. After dealing with a power cut at the maternity home, Fred follows an unusual sound and finds a newborn baby abandoned in a dustbin. Meanwhile, Dr Turner and Nurse Crane must deal with an alarming outbreak of diphtheria, and Sister Julienne receives news of an ambitious redevelopment programme that potentially threatens Nonnatus House. Starring Jenny Agutter and Stephen McGann(n)

programme.title: The Trial of Christine Keeler
programme.desc: Dr Stephen Ward reports the suspicious theft of some of his private photographs, and persistent rumours force Minister of War John Profumo into more denials and threats of legal action. Mandy Rice-Davies is enjoying her newfound press exposure, but the sordid tales of London's society sex parties and affairs with young models embarrass Christine's family. With Johnny's trial approaching, she considers running away from her problems(n)

programme.title: Match of the Day: The FA Cup
programme.desc: Manish Bhasin presents action from the latest third-round fixtures, including Liverpool v Everton at Anfield, Sheffield United v AFC Fylde at Bramall Lane and Middlesbrough v Tottenham Hotspur at Riverside Stadium. This was the second Merseyside derby at this stage in the last three seasons, while non-league Fylde aimed to produce one of the competition's great shocks against Chris Wilder's Premier League outfit, and Spurs boss Jose Mourinho began his bid to win the trophy he claimed with Chelsea in 2007(n)

programme.title: The Women's Football Show
programme.desc: Kelly Somers presents highlights of the weekend's games in the Super League, including Chelsea v Reading at Cherry Red Records Stadium and Tottenham Hotspur v Manchester City at The Hive Stadium(n)

programme.title: A Question of Sport
programme.desc: Sue Barker hosts a special edition celebrating 50 years of the quiz. She and regular team captains Phil Tufnell and Matt Dawson take a trip down memory lane as they are joined by three distinguished past guests in four-time Major-winning golfer Laura Davies, the most prolific try-scorer in English rugby league history Martin Offiah, and triple world champion gymnast Beth Tweddle, as well as former Rangers and Scotland striker Ally McCoist, who was once a team captain on the show(n)

programme.title: Breakfast

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Father Brown

programme.title: The Farmers' Country Showdown
programme.desc: The return of the programme celebrating inspirational farming families and the rural events where they showcase their hard work. Poultry farmers Nick and Jacob and organic and heritage fruit and vegetable farmer Patrick display their wares at Alexandra Palace Farmer's Market(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The return of the programme in which antiques experts search the UK for items to sell as they compete to make the most money at auction. Catherine Southon and James Braxton start off in the Home Counties(n)

programme.title: Pointless

programme.title: The One Show
