programme.title: The Reith Lectures
programme.desc: Jonathan Sumption argues that judges - especially those of the European Court of Human Rights - have usurped power by expanding the interpretation of human rights law. He explains that concepts of human rights have a long history in the common law. But by contrast, the European Convention on Human Rights has become a dynamic treaty, taking on new interpretations and powers(n)

programme.title: The Reith Lectures
programme.desc: Jonathan Sumption assesses the US and UK's constitutional models. He describes Britain's unwritten constitution as a political institution. programme.title: The Reith Lectures
programme.desc: Jonathan Sumption assesses the US and UK's constitutional models. He describes Britain's unwritten constitution as a political institution. programme.title: House of Commons
programme.desc: He is one of the most controversial figures to have sat in the Speaker's chair in the House of Commons. As John Bercow bows out after ten controversial years as Speaker, BBC Parliament revisits the career of a modernising but polarising figure. See the teenage Bercow's ‘Question Time' debut, not from the Commons but on the TV programme. Relive the former Tory MP's clashes with ministers as he's accused of bias and of bending the rules to try to stop Brexit. In addition - with more Commons archive - Bercow Bows Out offers the chance to re-live some of his favourite unique phrases, whether he's advising an MP to search for ‘a soothing medicament' or accusing others of ‘chuntering from a sedentary position'(n)

programme.desc: Pando and Bing play on the swings(n)

programme.title: Stòiridh
programme.desc: Fiona MacKenzie reads Am Mathan agus am Piàna, written and illustrated by David Litchfield and translated into Gaelic by Morag Stewart(n)

programme.title: Donnie Murdo (Danger Mouse)
programme.desc: DM is instantly dismissed for destroying half of London. Cartoon about the adventures of a crimebusting rodent(n)

programme.title: Buntàta Amh (Big Tatties)
programme.desc: The potato goes for a walk with his friend Sliseag(n)

programme.title: An Rud As Fheàrr Leam
programme.desc: Zac from Glasgow talks about his favourite hobbies(n)

programme.title: Dràgonan - Rèis chun an iomaill (Dragons: Race to the Edge)
programme.desc: When a dangerous subterranean Cavern Crasher dragon invades the Fireworm Queen's underground nest, she approaches the Riders on Dragon's Edge for help(n)

programme.title: Fuine (Home Baking)
programme.desc: Mairi MacRitchie and home bakers share their favourite pudding recipes. Mairi'd recipe for lemon surprise pudding separates in the oven to a zingy custard and a light lemon sponge. She also prepares a fresh summer fruit tart with rich custard(n)

programme.title: Speaking Our Language
programme.desc: An opportunity to learn Gaelic. Presented by Rhoda MacDonald(n)

programme.title: Earrann Eachdraidh (History Shorts)
programme.desc: Winter sports, including ski jumps, bob sleds and motor skiing(n)

programme.title: An Là (News)
programme.desc: Local, national and international news reports(n)

programme.title: Dreach Ùr
programme.desc: Shona Masson introduces ideas for upcycling fancy dress costumes, including a robot and a witch's hat and broom made from old cardboard boxes(n)

programme.title: Farpaisean Chon-Chaorach (Sheepdog Trials)
programme.desc: Donald MacSween and Catriona MacPhee introduce the best of the action from day one of the International Sheepdog Trials(n)

programme.title: Trusadh (Compelling Stories)
programme.desc: Make-up has long been a part of life, and has seen many changes over the years as fashion and society has evolved. Naomi Buchanan takes a fun and revealing journey into the world of make-up and the unique relationship that many people have with it(n)

programme.title: Oran na Mna
programme.desc: The lives of women who have contributed to the Gaelic songbook through the years, featuring Maggie MacInnes, who wrote the song-cycle A Woman's Song(n)

programme.title: Alleluia! (Spiritual Music & Verse)
programme.desc: Glasgow Islay Gaelic choir sing Gabh Mo Bheatha's Bitheadh I and Ruairidh Alastair MacLennan talks about the role faith plays in his life. Presented by Iain MacKinnon(n)

programme.title: Super 4
programme.desc: When a dragon chases the Trolls from their cave and they have nowhere to live, Ruby does not want to help them; she then discovers that their cave is filled with diamonds(n)

programme.desc: Animated comedy adventure series featuring a gang of heroes who protect the city of Technopolis and its King Kenric against evil elements(n)

programme.title: Thunderbirds Are Go
programme.desc: Gordon responds to an emergency along the Supreme Barrier Reef. The Tracy brothers once again set out to foil the nefarious plots of the evil Hood in an updated version of the show(n)

programme.desc: Danny's dare will see him attempt a bungee jump, but has he got the nerve to launch himself off the side of the Tees Transporter bridge?(n)

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: When Butch breaks up with his girlfriend, Tom, Jerry, and Tuffy work to bring them back together so Butch won't go after Toodles(n)

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: When the gang find an air hockey table in the garage, it's cats versus mice in an epic game of hockey!(n)

programme.title: Scrambled!
programme.desc: Two hours of children's fun and entertainment(n)

programme.title: Mr Magoo
programme.desc: Magoo takes Fizz for a toy containing top secret information, which he steals from a secret agent, but it's actually just weasel.(n)

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Mr. Bean enters Scrapper into a beauty contest so that he can win First Prize: a trip with Irma to Paris.(n)

programme.title: The Rubbish World of Dave Spud
programme.desc: Dave demands to go on a foreign exchange. He soon finds himself headed for a week-long stay in a flat a few doors down.(n)

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: Four pandas absorb the mystical Hero Chi of the Four Constellation, before seeking the Dragon Master as their teacher.(n)

programme.title: Craig of the Creek
programme.desc: Craig of the Creek follows a young boy and his two friends as they go on adventures in a world of untamed, kid-dominated wilderness in the creek(n)

programme.title: Beautiful Baking with Juliet Sear
programme.desc: Juliet looks forward to a healthy new year, baking savoury breakfast muffins, granola protein bars and a plant-based cacti and succulents cake. TV's Dr Ranj Singh serves up a healthy five-vegetable lasagne, and Juliet meets a vegan cheese producer(n)

programme.title: John and Lisa's Weekend Kitchen
programme.desc: With Christmas behind them, John Torode and Lisa Faulkner present some light and fresh recipes to kick off the new year. They start with home-made granola and stewed fruit, Lisa makes a one-pot vegetarian pasta dish and a spiced cod tray bake and John demonstrates pearl barley with an array of mushrooms(n)

programme.title: Nadia's Family Feasts
programme.desc: Nadia Sawalha is joined by chef Eran Tibi to dish up a family feast from the Middle East. The menu comprises an Israeli mezze of stuffed brick and sweet potato hummus for breakfast, mussakhan for lunch, Eran's aubergine, tomato and beef stew for dinner and Nadia's cigar baklava with cheat's pistachio ice cream for dessert(n)

programme.title: The Voice UK
programme.desc: Emma Willis hosts the spinning-chair singing contest, in which celebrity 'coaches' seek out the nation's best vocal talent. But there is a simple twist - with the four coaches selecting their teams through 'blind auditions', looks play no part in the selection process, meaning each singer is chosen on vocal ability alone. Meghan Trainor joins the show as the newest recruit to the judging panel, joining series regulars Olly Murs, Tom Jones and Will.i.am(n)

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Joel Dommett hosts the singing contest in which a celebrity panel and a studio audience must guess the famous faces performing behind elaborate costumes. In the first episode, Rita Ora, Jonathan Ross, Davina McCall and Ken Jeong make up the panel, trying to identify the performers inside a bee, a duck, a unicorn, a hedgehog, a butterfly and a chameleon(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Game show, hosted by Ben Shephard, in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase Celebrity Special
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as TV presenters Donna Air, Amanda Lamb, Sarah Greene and Dan Snow pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds for charity. They must work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Dancing on Ice
programme.desc: Following on from the launch show over Christmas, Phillip Schofield and Holly Willoughby host the start of the celebrity skating challenge, joined by judges Christopher Dean, Jayne Torvill, Ashley Banjo and new addition John 'Fabulous' Barrowman. This year's celebrities - six of whom will perform tonight - are Ben Hanlin, Caprice, Joe Swash, Kevin Kilbane, Libby Clegg, Lisa George, Lucrezia Millarini, Maura Higgins, Perri Kiely and Trisha Goddard and - in the show's first same-sex partnership - Ian 'H' Watkins. Michael Barrymore was due to compete, but a broken wrist has ruled him out, and he is replaced by Radzi Chinyanganya(n)

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: Another six unknown celebrities battle it out in the singing contest that has taken other countries by storm. The mystery contestants are dressed head to toe in elaborate costumes designed to hide their identities, while the panel - Jonathan Ross, Davina McCall, Rita Ora and Ken Jeong - tries to guess who they are. By the end of the show, the second celebrity's identity will be revealed and they will be waving goodbye to the show. Joel Dommett hosts the proceedings(n)

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Actress-writer Ruth Jones, comedian and actor Johnny Vegas and boxing star David Haye take their turns at answering the 15 questions that could bag them £1million for their chosen charities. As always, if they get stuck, they have four lifelines to fall back on - Ask the Audience, 50/50, Phone a Friend and Ask the Host. Jeremy Clarkson asks the questions(n)

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Desolation of Smaug (2013)
programme.desc: The party of dwarves and their hobbit ally continue the quest to reclaim their lost kingdom, journeying through the forest home of ancestral enemy the elves and finally facing the dragon that drove them from their home. Meanwhile, Gandalf the wizard investigates the rise of a mysterious dark power. Part two of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy based on JRR Tolkien's novel, starring Martin Freeman, Ian McKellen, Richard Armitage and Orlando Bloom(n)

programme.title: Teach My Pet to Do That
programme.desc: Animal lover and comedian Alexander Armstrong is joined by a team of specialist pet trainers as they teach a range of animals and pets to pull off incredible tricks. In the first episode, the host welcomes a daschund labrador cross called Eric and a miniature horse call Aslan, as trainers Jo-Rosie Haffenden and Nando Brown attempt to teach them how to answer a door to the cue of a doorbell. Elsewhere in the programme, the trainers hit the road and attempt to train River the cat to ride on the back of Moss the dog(n)

programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.desc: Cameras follow criminal barrister Robert Rinder as he takes on real-life cases in a studio courtroom(n)

programme.desc: A mix of celebrity chat, lifestyle features, advice and competitions(n)

programme.title: Loose Women

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: The dealers pitch up in Stoke-on-Trent, where Tim Hogarth falls for an art nouveau mirror and Stewart Hofgartner spends big on a rare gold watch(n)

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which a team of family and friends answers questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then tries to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as Julian, Jo, Chris and Holly pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Will is stunned by some news, and Harriet worries about the future. Meanwhile, Matty struggles to get through to Moira(n)

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: A social worker brings worrying news for Fiz and Tyrone. Meanwhile, Bertie's injections prove an ordeal for Daniel, and David wills Shona to defy the odds(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Barnaby is dragged along to the wedding of the son of Sarah's friend Hazel, the last thing he expects to find himself doing is investigating a murder. But when his wife discovers the body of the bride, Laurel, who has been squeezed to death by her own wedding dress corset, the detective must look more closely at his fellow guests. The victim's husband Gavin is convinced that his wife's death had everything to do with her outspoken nature on her radio show, so Winter's attention soon turns to her unique community of nocturnal listeners. Gavin's scorned ex-fiancee and local wedding dress designer Serena also comes under suspicion, and Barnaby and Winter's enquiries lead them to a local wedding fayre. Neil Dudgeon stars, with Kelly Brook, Nick Hancock and Liz Fraser(n)

programme.title: Ross Kemp and the Armed Police
programme.desc: In a follow-up documentary to last year's Ross Kemp and the Armed Police, the actor and film-maker follows tactical firearms units to investigate whether all police in the UK will one day be armed. With armed officers now a more regular presence on Britain's streets - in train stations and at airports - Ross goes out on a raid with a mobile undercover unit used to tackle new dangers with pre-emptive and confrontational tactics. He also gains access to their military-style training facility(n)

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Action from the latest edition of the weekly AEW event, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley(n)

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef travels through France to visit the locations that inspired his culinary career, beginning at the Chateau Cheval Blanc in Saint-Emilion, before going back to the kitchens of the Hostellerie de Plaisance, where he worked as a lad more than 30 years ago. He rounds off his trip by cooking at an award-winning vineyard(n)

programme.title: ITV Nightscreen
programme.desc: Text-based information service(n)

programme.desc: Cameras follow criminal barrister Robert Rinder as he takes on real-life cases in a studio courtroom(n)

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: More celebrity interviews and topical debate from a female perspective(n)

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David Dickinson presents the show from Hartlepool, helping members of the public sort the treasures from their trash and meeting one of the youngest sellers featured on the series(n)

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which five members of a running club answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants who have never met before pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dawn prepares for Lucas' arrival, Harriet makes a shocking discovery, and Danny asks for Sarah's help(n)

programme.title: Britain's Busiest Motorway
programme.desc: Traffic officers Andy and Keith are called out on the night shift to remove a cupboard from the carriageway, with the increased speed of the traffic putting them in serious danger. Back in the control room, Emily spots some loose horses causing chaos at Junction 23, while at junction 10 a bridge joint is being replaced and the engineers are in a race against time to get the job done before the sun rises(n)

programme.title: The Martin Lewis Money Show: Live
programme.desc: The presenter provides an annual financial health check for the nation in the wake of the Christmas expenses, offering up some 'Bill-Busting' advice on the best ways to cut the costs of energy, broadband, mobile phones, and digital TV bills. Plus, more questions from the audience in Ask Martin Anything(n)

programme.title: The National Television Awards Celebrate 25 Years
programme.desc: Julie Walters narrates a look back at the long-running awards show. Previous hosts Trevor McDonald and Dermot O'Leary share their memories of anchoring the event, while their successor, David Walliams, looks ahead to taking the reins for the 2020 show. Among the stars sharing their memories of past awards ceremonies are Graham Norton, Ant & Dec, Holly Willoughby, David Tennant, Simon Cowell, Paul O'Grady, Richard & Judy, Danny Dyer, Craig Revel Horwood, Motsi Mabuse, Brendan O'Carroll, Phillip Schofield, Julie Hesmondhalgh, Michael Barrymore, Eamonn Holmes and Davina McCall(n)

programme.title: Piers Morgan's Life Stories
programme.desc: Timothy West joins the host to look back on a five-decade career as one of Britain's best-loved actors. The former EastEnders star speaks candidly about his 52-year marriage to Fawlty Towers actress Prunella Scales, and the impact of her battle with dementia on their lives. He also reveals the trauma of his first wife's mental health problems, and how he finally made peace with his daughter after several years of estrangement. On a lighter note, Timothy also reflects on his role at the wedding of Prince Charles and Camilla Parker-Bowles, and the time he toured the set of Coronation Street - disguised as former Soviet president Mikhail Gorbachev(n)

He also gains access to their military-style training facility(n)

programme.desc: Action from the latest edition of the weekly AEW event, featuring all of the biggest stars on the roster, including Adam Page, Chris Jericho, Cody and Jon Moxley(n)

programme.title: James Martin's French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef travels through France to visit the locations that inspired his culinary career, beginning at the Chateau Cheval Blanc in Saint-Emilion, before going back to the kitchens of the Hostellerie de Plaisance, where he worked as a lad more than 30 years ago. He rounds off his trip by cooking at an award-winning vineyard(n)

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis in which five members of a running club answer questions about top 10 lists from the realms of pop culture and general knowledge, then try to score a perfect 10 in the final round to take home the prize money(n)

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz in which contestants answer questions to win turns on an arcade-style machine. Dropping tokens down a choice of four chutes, they hope to knock piles of them off a moving shelf - and the more they collect, the greater the prize fund. The player who has won the least amount is then eliminated, and the last one standing competes for a £10,000 jackpot(n)

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh presents as four contestants who have never met before pit their wits against ruthless quiz genius the Chaser in the hope of winning a potential prize pot worth thousands of pounds. They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Dawn prepares for Lucas' arrival, Harriet makes a shocking discovery, and Danny asks for Sarah's help(n)

programme.title: Britain's Busiest Motorway
programme.desc: Traffic officers Andy and Keith are called out on the night shift to remove a cupboard from the carriageway, with the increased speed of the traffic putting them in serious danger. Back in the control room, Emily spots some loose horses causing chaos at Junction 23, while at junction 10 a bridge joint is being replaced and the engineers are in a race against time to get the job done before the sun rises(n)

programme.title: The Martin Lewis Money Show: Live
programme.desc: The presenter provides an annual financial health check for the nation in the wake of the Christmas expenses, offering up some 'Bill-Busting' advice on the best ways to cut the costs of energy, broadband, mobile phones, and digital TV bills. Plus, more questions from the audience in Ask Martin Anything(n)

programme.title: The National Television Awards Celebrate 25 Years
programme.desc: Julie Walters narrates a look back at the long-running awards show. Previous hosts Trevor McDonald and Dermot O'Leary share their memories of anchoring the event, while their successor, David Walliams, looks ahead to taking the reins for the 2020 show. Among the stars sharing their memories of past awards ceremonies are Graham Norton, Ant & Dec, Holly Willoughby, David Tennant, Simon Cowell, Paul O'Grady, Richard & Judy, Danny Dyer, Craig Revel Horwood, Motsi Mabuse, Brendan O'Carroll, Phillip Schofield, Julie Hesmondhalgh, Michael Barrymore, Eamonn Holmes and Davina McCall(n)

programme.title: Piers Morgan's Life Stories
programme.desc: Timothy West joins the host to look back on a five-decade career as one of Britain's best-loved actors. The former EastEnders star speaks candidly about his 52-year marriage to Fawlty Towers actress Prunella Scales, and the impact of her battle with dementia on their lives. He also reveals the trauma of his first wife's mental health problems, and how he finally made peace with his daughter after several years of estrangement. On a lighter note, Timothy also reflects on his role at the wedding of Prince Charles and Camilla Parker-Bowles, and the time he toured the set of Coronation Street - disguised as former Soviet president Mikhail Gorbachev(n)

programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis struggle to determine whether a death during a college-based clinical trial for a new antidepressant was murder or suicide, and receive little assistance from the institution's evasive psychiatric professor. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster's body goes missing on the night of his death, a sinister web of secrets and lies is exposed in the village of Little Malton. As DCI Barnaby, DS Nelson and new forensic pathologist Kam Karimore investigate the mysterious crime, they find themselves drawn into a macabre world of body-snatching during their quest to identify the perpetrator. Detective drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Gwilym Lee, Manjinder Virk, Helen Baxendale and Navin Chowdhry(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: When a respectable GP is found dead in a public lavatory, the young Morse's outlandish theories see him relegated to general duties by the newly arrived Chief Superintendent Bright. Humiliated and humbled, Endeavour has to investigate from the sidelines, but it's not long before he's questioning DI Fred Thursday's orders and risking his career to avert a family tragedy. Shaun Evans stars, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, Sean Rigby and James Bradshaw(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Christmas special of the detective drama from 2016. The village of Little Auburn has stood abandoned since the Second World War, but now plans are afoot to restore it to its former glory via three competing projects. It is left to local landowner Roderick Craven to determine which scheme will win out, but on the eve of his big decision, one of the project leaders is murdered. DCI Barnaby and his new partner DS Jamie Winter are soon on the case, and when death stalks the streets of Little Auburn again, Barnaby and Winter are dragged into a web of conspiracy involving fraud, deadly snakes, and Roderick's estranged brother, Milo (guest star Hugh Dennis). Neil Dudgeon stars, with Nick Hendrix making his debut as Barnaby's latest assistant(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The local gossips go to town when a naked and mutilated corpse is discovered in the middle of a crop circle. However, their lurid tales of extraterrestrial abduction soon take a turn for the macabre when more similarly injured cadavers are discovered, causing DCI Barnaby to question his down-to-earth approach. Murder mystery, starring John Nettles(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Shaun Evans steps into the shoes of John Thaw in this 1965-set prequel to Inspector Morse, playing a younger version of the cerebral detective involved in the hunt for a missing schoolgirl. Soon deep in a full-blown murder investigation, Endeavour is sidelined, discredited and at a dead end - so he risks all to begin his own quest for justice. Roger Allam and Charlie Creed-Miles co-star in the mystery(n)

programme.title: Barging Round Britain with John Sergeant
programme.desc: The broadcaster returns to travel more of Britain's canal network, exploring the extraordinary stories of the people and places on the way. The series starts with John navigating the Peak Forest Canal, which runs through stunning countryside from Buxworth in Derbyshire to Ashton-under-Lyne. Along the way, in Hyde he meets former boxer Ricky Hatton, who discusses his plans to revitalise the area and offer new opportunities to local youngsters, and joins a team of junior archaeologists at Mellor Mill, who are attempting to unearth the remains of what was once one of the world's largest mills(n)

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: In 1935, beleaguered Bournemouth mother Louisa Durrell decides to uproot her family and build a new life on the sun-drenched island of Corfu. However, with money problems and four unruly children to care for, even a new start might not be enough to banish her troubles. Period drama, starring Keeley Hawes, based on Gerald Durrell's trilogy of Corfu memoirs, which includes My Family and Other Animals(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: First episode of the drama, starring Michael Kitchen as a jaded police superintendent who would rather be fighting the enemy in France than crime on the south coast as the Second World War gathers pace in 1940. However, when a local magistrate's German wife is murdered amid a growing cloud of uncertainty and anti-Nazi feeling, the ensuing investigation is anything but routine. Edward Fox, Robert Hardy, David Horovitch, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks co-star(n)

programme.title: Judi Dench's Wild Borneo Adventure
programme.desc: Part one of two. The award-winning actress embarks on a trip of a lifetime to uncover the lush rainforests, magical wildlife and spectacular coastlines of Malaysian Borneo. Judi experiences the rainforest for the first time in a thrilling 100-mile helicopter ride to the heart of the island with expert Glen Reynolds, before observing orangutans in the wild and learning how they are helping to prevent global warming(n)

programme.title: Judi Dench's Wild Borneo Adventure
programme.desc: The actress journeys more than 560km down Borneo's Kinabatangan river and along the island's coastline to explore the unique wildlife that lives in this threatened environment. With scientist Kerisha Kntayya, Judi joins a crocodile hunt with a difference. Kerisha plucks young crocodiles out of the water. Judi then joins Kerisha's team as they wrestle an adult croc as part of the study Kerisha hopes will help save these prehistoric creatures. The Oscar winner, who's had a fascination with bats from an early age, also explores the Gomantong cave, home to more than a million bats(n)

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: The year 1956 finds jazz-loving clergyman Sidney Chambers attending a talk by Reverend Nathaniel Todd, a member of the formative US civil rights movement. During the event, protestors disrupt the speech and release fireworks, causing the audience to panic. In the chaos, Todd's son Charles is stabbed and killed by an unseen assailant. The murder sees racial tensions spike and Geordie Keating is called in to investigate. Things are further complicated when Sidney finds himself drawn to passionate young activist, and their tentative romance faces pressure from all sides. Robson Green stars, with James Norton, Tessa Peake-Jones, Samuel West and Paterson Joseph(n)

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: With Violet gone, Sidney loses himself in drink. After a heavy whiskey session leaves him without his jacket - and little memory of the night before - he discovers to his horror that he was the last person to see a young woman alive. As he struggles to remember her final words, Geordie grows concerned - both for the murdered girl, so callously abandoned outside a local slum, and for his friend's troubled state of mind. James Norton stars, with Robson Green, Tessa Peake-Jones, Al Weaver and Kacey Ainsworth(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: The detective sets out for Norfolk when a country publican begs him to help solve a murder - but is disappointed when the innkeeper turns out to be a budding author and the killing fictional. However, he soon has food for thought when a real death occurs - committed by a seemingly ghostly hand. Geraldine Alexander and Ian McCulloch guest star, with David Suchet(n)

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: A woman's body is pulled from the river, reminding Frost that he investigated the death of her husband's first wife years ago. Unfortunately, it turns out that a key witness's statement went astray during the earlier case - which leads to Frost being suspended from duty. Discreetly continuing his enquiries, he is intrigued to learn the local priest recently heard a very disturbing confession. Starring David Jason, Eoin McCarthy, Anthony Calf, Kenneth Cope and Isla Blair(n)

programme.title: George and Mildred
programme.desc: The Ropers babysit for their neighbours, but George misses his usual routine - so he nips out to a darts match with the infant in tow. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy(n)

programme.title: Man About the House

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: Pawnbroker Peter Lawson is shot dead in an armed robbery at his premises and Frost's investigations unearth a tragic family secret. He is convinced Lawson was killed by one of his children in revenge for years of systematic sexual abuse - but the truth turns out to be even more chilling. David Jason stars, with Diane Keen, Isla Blair, Matt Bardock, Anthony Bate, Mark Lambert and Edward Purver(n)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina is shocked to discover a severed hand in a dustbin and the subsequent police investigation unearths evidence which suggests someone on Lord Ashfordly's estate may be responsible. Meanwhile, Peggy invests in a freezer for her latest business venture, but soon finds her new purchase at the centre of the murder case. Last in series, starring Tricia Penrose, Gwen Taylor and Jonathan Kerrigan(n)

programme.desc: Reg is determined to rebuild his life, Vic makes the Sugdens an offer they cannot refuse, Lynn receives a visit from a journalist, and Joe reaches the end of his tether(n)

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Annie returns to the arms of her family and the Windsors are relieved that their problems are over. Jessica's lies catch up with her, and the village will never be the same again(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Denise apologises to Ken for hurting his feelings, and Tanya tells Des she has finished with Alex, so it is now up to him to finish with Raquel(n)

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly is relieved when Andy agrees that Steve must go, Liz asks Steve why he humiliated Jim, and Raquel is thrilled for Tanya that Alex has left his wife(n)

programme.title: The Durrells

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Gina is shocked to discover a severed hand in a dustbin and the subsequent police investigation unearths evidence which suggests someone on Lord Ashfordly's estate may be responsible. Meanwhile, Peggy invests in a freezer for her latest business venture, but soon finds her new purchase at the centre of the murder case. Last in series, starring Tricia Penrose, Gwen Taylor and Jonathan Kerrigan(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: As the Second World War continues to rage, Foyle investigates a pro-Hitler organisation he suspects may be linked to a mysterious death at the White Feather Hotel, while reluctant assistant Milner struggles to decide where his loyalties lie. Crime drama, starring Michael Kitchen and Anthony Howell, with Charles Dance and Maggie Steed(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Bentham DeQuetteville falls to his death from a roof after seeing a headless horseman, his aristocratic family seem more concerned about their forthcoming Civil War re-enactment than the incident. As Barnaby and Jones try to discover the truth behind the ghostly figure, their investigation uncovers shocking secrets about the DeQuettevilles. Drama, starring Neil Dudgeon and Jason Hughes, with James Callis, William Gaunt and Raquel Cassidy(n)

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Geordie suspects foul play when computer laboratory head Professor Simms keels over and dies from mercury poisoning. It seems the deceased recently spent the night in the lab with someone other than his wife, possibly a fellow educated man. Geordie seeks advice from Leonard, and the pair start to uncover the surprisingly messy love lives of Simms' colleagues. Elsewhere, Cathy is brutally tricked, Will returns to Grantchester and Mrs C makes a shocking discovery. Drama, starring Robson Green and Tom Brittney(n)

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: A relaxed Will is installed as the new vicar, though is only just back at the vicarage when Geordie drops by requesting his help. Initially reluctant to be drawn in, Will is swayed when he learns that the matter concerns Adam, a profoundly deaf boy from a devout family, whose mother has recently died following a fall. Adam's father thinks his son was responsible and the truth needs uncovering to help the family heal. Will's own troubled past threatens to colour his view of the case - and Geordie realises his new friend has demons of his own. Drama, starring Robson Green and Tom Brittney(n)

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales(n)

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway and Lewis struggle to determine whether a death during a college-based clinical trial for a new antidepressant was murder or suicide, and receive little assistance from the institution's evasive psychiatric professor. A second student's demise then leads to the revelation that the trial's participants are all operating under the influence of a mind-altering drug, and that the lines between love, obsession and madness have become dangerously blurred. Guest starring Douglas Henshall (Primeval), Lucy Liemann (Rev) and Thomas Brodie Sangster (Love Actually)(n)

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot visits a garden fete where he meets the son of an old friend and his fiancee. After having tea with the couple, the sleuth suspects that they are both in danger and Hastings' new interest in photography provides him with the clue to solve a mystery involving cyanide, failing brakes and mixed-up love lives.(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When wealthy landowner Gregory Lancaster's body goes missing on the night of his death, a sinister web of secrets and lies is exposed in the village of Little Malton. As DCI Barnaby, DS Nelson and new forensic pathologist Kam Karimore investigate the mysterious crime, they find themselves drawn into a macabre world of body-snatching during their quest to identify the perpetrator. Detective drama, starring Neil Dudgeon, Gwilym Lee, Manjinder Virk, Helen Baxendale and Navin Chowdhry(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: When a respectable GP is found dead in a public lavatory, the young Morse's outlandish theories see him relegated to general duties by the newly arrived Chief Superintendent Bright. Humiliated and humbled, Endeavour has to investigate from the sidelines, but it's not long before he's questioning DI Fred Thursday's orders and risking his career to avert a family tragedy. Shaun Evans stars, with Roger Allam, Anton Lesser, Sean Rigby and James Bradshaw(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Christmas special of the detective drama from 2016. The village of Little Auburn has stood abandoned since the Second World War, but now plans are afoot to restore it to its former glory via three competing projects. It is left to local landowner Roderick Craven to determine which scheme will win out, but on the eve of his big decision, one of the project leaders is murdered. DCI Barnaby and his new partner DS Jamie Winter are soon on the case, and when death stalks the streets of Little Auburn again, Barnaby and Winter are dragged into a web of conspiracy involving fraud, deadly snakes, and Roderick's estranged brother, Milo (guest star Hugh Dennis). Neil Dudgeon stars, with Nick Hendrix making his debut as Barnaby's latest assistant(n)

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The local gossips go to town when a naked and mutilated corpse is discovered in the middle of a crop circle. However, their lurid tales of extraterrestrial abduction soon take a turn for the macabre when more similarly injured cadavers are discovered, causing DCI Barnaby to question his down-to-earth approach. Murder mystery, starring John Nettles(n)

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Shaun Evans steps into the shoes of John Thaw in this 1965-set prequel to Inspector Morse, playing a younger version of the cerebral detective involved in the hunt for a missing schoolgirl. Soon deep in a full-blown murder investigation, Endeavour is sidelined, discredited and at a dead end - so he risks all to begin his own quest for justice. Roger Allam and Charlie Creed-Miles co-star in the mystery(n)

programme.title: Barging Round Britain with John Sergeant
programme.desc: The broadcaster returns to travel more of Britain's canal network, exploring the extraordinary stories of the people and places on the way. The series starts with John navigating the Peak Forest Canal, which runs through stunning countryside from Buxworth in Derbyshire to Ashton-under-Lyne. Along the way, in Hyde he meets former boxer Ricky Hatton, who discusses his plans to revitalise the area and offer new opportunities to local youngsters, and joins a team of junior archaeologists at Mellor Mill, who are attempting to unearth the remains of what was once one of the world's largest mills(n)

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin(n)

programme.desc: Poor Mildred's hopes are raised when work-shy George looks for a job, but his chances of finding gainful employment seem slim. Comedy, starring Brian Murphy and Yootha Joyce(n)

programme.title: The Durrells
programme.desc: In 1935, beleaguered Bournemouth mother Louisa Durrell decides to uproot her family and build a new life on the sun-drenched island of Corfu. However, with money problems and four unruly children to care for, even a new start might not be enough to banish her troubles. Period drama, starring Keeley Hawes, based on Gerald Durrell's trilogy of Corfu memoirs, which includes My Family and Other Animals(n)

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: First episode of the drama, starring Michael Kitchen as a jaded police superintendent who would rather be fighting the enemy in France than crime on the south coast as the Second World War gathers pace in 1940. However, when a local magistrate's German wife is murdered amid a growing cloud of uncertainty and anti-Nazi feeling, the ensuing investigation is anything but routine. Edward Fox, Robert Hardy, David Horovitch, Anthony Howell and Honeysuckle Weeks co-star(n)

programme.title: Judi Dench's Wild Borneo Adventure
programme.desc: Part one of two. The award-winning actress embarks on a trip of a lifetime to uncover the lush rainforests, magical wildlife and spectacular coastlines of Malaysian Borneo. Judi experiences the rainforest for the first time in a thrilling 100-mile helicopter ride to the heart of the island with expert Glen Reynolds, before observing orangutans in the wild and learning how they are helping to prevent global warming(n)

programme.title: Judi Dench's Wild Borneo Adventure
programme.desc: The actress journeys more than 560km down Borneo's Kinabatangan river and along the island's coastline to explore the unique wildlife that lives in this threatened environment. With scientist Kerisha Kntayya, Judi joins a crocodile hunt with a difference. Kerisha plucks young crocodiles out of the water. Judi then joins Kerisha's team as they wrestle an adult croc as part of the study Kerisha hopes will help save these prehistoric creatures. The Oscar winner, who's had a fascination with bats from an early age, also explores the Gomantong cave, home to more than a million bats(n)

programme.desc: Impressionist and actor Alistair McGowan, former Dragons' Den businesswoman Hilary Devey and singer Josh Groban compete to have their pet hates banished, on the comedy panel show chaired by Frank Skinner. Their gripes include supermarkets, the smoking ban, Valentine's Day and people who treat animals like humans(n)

programme.title: Room 101
programme.desc: MasterChef judge Gregg Wallace, sports presenter Gabby Logan and comedienne Sarah Millican join Frank Skinner for the comedy panel show, competing to banish their pet hates - which include people at cashpoints, barbecues, shop assistants, buffets and anti-social cats - to the infamous room(n)

programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn relive the golden age of steam. They begin by exploring how the introduction of steam railways in the early 19th century created a domestic revolution, from the way people lived to the food they ate. Arriving at Ffestiniog Railway in Snowdonia, they find out how millions of tons of slate were moved down the mountain, while underground, Alex experiences the brutal conditions face by miners in the Llechwedd Quarry(n)

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson embarks on another expedition through some of Britain's most historic landscapes. The moors and valleys of West Yorkshire were the home of, and inspiration for, the Brontes, the literary family who produced such classics as Wuthering Heights and Jane Eyre. Over four days, Tony heads out from the Victorian wool capital of Bradford and treks in a giant loop around what is now known as Bronte Country. From the birth of Charlotte, Emily, Anne and their brother Branwell in the suburb of Thornton, he traces their childhoods to the much-romanticised Bronte hub of Haworth, finding that the harsh reality of life in the 1820s was far removed from the fantasy world dreamed up by the children at their father's parsonage home(n)

programme.title: Forbidden History

programme.title: The Blue Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough presents an exploration of Earth's vast seas, which cover 70 per cent of the planet's surface. programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn continue to relive the golden age of steam and how the Victorian railways created modern Britain. They visit Beamish in County Durham, learning how the rail companies first realised there was money to be made in moving people rather than commodities. Then Peter and Alex live the life of navvies, the men who built the thousands of miles of tracks in all weather conditions, and Ruth finds out what impact the new railroads had on the cottage industries. She also learns about the role of the guard, and the trio learn what precautions were necessary for taking a long journey on a train that was yet to include the necessary facilities(n)

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: The Rion-Antirion Bridge, which runs for 3kms and links the town of Rio on the Peloponnese peninsula to Antirrio on mainland Greece. Located in one of Europe's most active seismic zones, its engineers had to conquer the problems of deep water, high winds and constant land mass movement to build the colossal structure(n)

programme.title: Big Fat Quiz of the Decade
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr presents this super-sized edition of the annual quiz, looking back over the past 10 years. Claudia Winkleman, Nish Kumar, Joe Lycett, Alan Carr, Stacey Solomon and Jonathan Ross battle it out to prove who can remember the most about the decade, with questions including why was lasagna big news in 2013? Who squeezed through a hole in the wall in 2015? And what are Pikachu's friends called? Big Fat regulars Jon Snow and Charles Dance help set the questions(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Laura Hamilton show Neil and Sarah Marks properties in Carcassonne and Wiltshire, as they look to settle down following Neil's retirement(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As the Christmas season draws near, Frasier is furious to learn that Daphne and Niles want to host the family get-together, prompting a feud between the brothers. Meanwhile, Roz finds herself falling for a department store Santa Claus. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four strangers from Hertfordshire host their way to the £1,000 prize. First up is stay-at-home mum Mabs, who wants to show her guests an authentic African evening. It's a more traditional fare on night two as freelance journalist Sam aims to impress with his home-made classics, while night three sees the turn of super confident part-time radio DJ Ben to try and bag a grand with a menu of international flavours. Boxing enthusiast and teacher Perdi takes over on the last night with her menu of dinner party favourites and some very obscure entertainment(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Crewe and Stoke, psychology student Sarah hopes that her Jamaican menu will encourage her guests to party Caribbean-style. However, bicycle shop owner Kevin puts his foot in it. Motivational speaker Kayode - who went onto bigger things on The Apprentice 2018 - is upset when he thinks that Sarah is disrespecting his carrots. Can nurse Yvette calm things down?(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Four amateur cooks throw dinner parties in and around the Cotswolds - club DJ Daniel, IT operations manager Blanche, party planner Rachel, and actor and musician Kristian(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Greater Manchester is the location for three couples to host a trio of dinner parties. Married couple Colette and Richard kick off the competition with their glitz and glam evening inspired by Colette's love of all things shiny. They're joined by professional Thai boxer Candy and her fellow fighter and partner Michael, who don't hold back when it comes to their opinions on the food, somewhat unsettling their hosts. The third couple are food technology teacher Kim and her fireman boyfriend Sean(n)

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Travis Boersma, co-founder and president of one of the largest privately owned drive-through coffee shop chains in America, goes undercover to learn whether the culture he and his brother hoped to implement is being upheld by the company's front-line employees(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray goes to a father-daughter dance and ends up reminiscing about events leading up to Ally's birth. Comedy, starring Ray Romano and Madylin Sweeten(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and the family attend an open day at the twins' school, during which first-grader Michael shocks and embarrasses them by reading out a story obviously based on their constant bickering(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The brothers visit a luxury spa, where they are astonished to discover they are not enjoying the highest level of service and try to sneak into an area reserved exclusively for its most valued members. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is left with no choice but to see patients in his apartment, while Frasier is forced to share his studio and airtime with an arrogant financial analyst - and later finds himself accused of sexually harassing her. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman and Laura Hamilton show Bev and Gary D'Cruz homes in the Cotswolds and Lanzarote, with a budget of £600,000 for the UK and £400,000 for the island in the Canaries(n)

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: Two sisters fall out over their plane to open a restaurant in Spain, while a couple in France are faced with the shocking realisation of how much their project is going to cost(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiello's in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owner's fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordon's help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him(n)

programme.title: How to Lose Weight Well
programme.desc: Doctors Xand van Tulleken and Helen Lawal oversee proceedings as more people attempt some of the most popular and talked about diets on the market today, while cook Stacie Stewart gives advice about recipes. In the opening edition, Laura and Gellner have two weeks to slim down for a spa day, sisters Aishia and Karlette go on six-week diets for their joint birthday party, and truckers Adain and Gerry hope to lose weight for a hot-tub party in four months' time(n)

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: Return of the home makeover show, beginning with Tim and Emily. They fell in love with their 16th-century, Grade II listed Cotswold cottage on first viewing, despite an abundance of dark beams, low ceilings and woodchip. For George, the project is his oldest house yet. And In Kent he tackles an oast house. Can he design a super cool bedroom for eight-year-old Bella in this unusual tower?(n)

programme.title: Sean Lock: Keep It Light
programme.desc: The 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown captain captured live on stage in a stand-up performance, talking about everything from the price of cinema food, accusations of him having a mid-life crisis, his behaviour on the internet and jewellery heists(n)

programme.title: SAS: Who Dares Wins
programme.desc: Twenty-five men and women, including an ex-SAS operator working as a mole, face an intense start to the latest course, led by Chief Instructor Ant Middleton. It begins with a cold-water shock as the recruits must jump from a moving speedboat into the freezing Atlantic Ocean. They then swim to the shore of a remote Scottish island, where the recruits are based for the duration of the course. One among them is an undercover SAS operator, who left the division just over a year ago(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Agents Max and Steve in East London try to recover over £7,000 owed by a restaurant owner for an unpaid gas bill, while officers Gareth and Mitch in Gloucestershire seek just under £3,000 from the owner of a car wash. Stewart and Vic are in Manchester trying to recover nearly £5,000 owed by a blinds and shutters supplier to a dissatisfied customer(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Gareth and Mitch are on the trail of £2,500 in unpaid parking tickets in Cardiff, and while the debtor is not at home, they notice his car is sporting false number plates and call the police. The duo also face an angry defendant in Swindon when trying to collect £2,000 for unpaid rent on a lock-up, while in Buckinghamshire, Matt and Garry consider seizing a haul of luxury watches to pay more than £16,000 owed to a landlord(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor set out to evict a tenant from a property in Manchester but when the man claims he knew nothing about the court order tempers begin to fray. A car salesman in Cumbria is not happy about paying £4,500 to a dissatisfied customer, and in Shropshire a pub licensee claims she is unable to pay the rent she owes to her ex-landlord. With emotions running high, can she cut a new deal?(n)

programme.title: Bad Tenants, Rogue Landlords
programme.desc: Updates on stories featured in previous episodes, including Kent couple Rachel and Chris, who were pushed to the limit when their relationship with their tenant broke down and she stopped paying rent, leaving them more than £5,000 out of pocket. Plus, a young mum locked out of her home by the young couple she allowed to stay there for free while the wife had a baby, and a landlord who reduced her tenants' rent when they got into financial difficulties - only for the payments to end altogether(n)

programme.title: Bad Tenants, Rogue Landlords
programme.desc: An edition catching up with previous cases. Owed thousands in rent, landlord Matthew decided to evict his tenant, and called on an eviction specialist for help. As the tenant lived with seven cats, Matthew was worried about the state of the property, but that turned out to be the least of his problems. Cameras catch up with Matthew to see if he turned his property around. Having found a buyer for his house, Kirk asked the sitting tenant to leave. However, on the day of the move, she refused, stopped paying rent and Kirk's sale fell through. Kirk had to evict his nightmare tenant before he lost the house. Was he able to sell his property at least, or was he tempted to become a landlord once again?(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords

Cameras also follow 31-year-old stockbroker Bobby, who gives his 11-year-old daughter Lilly Rae anything if it spurs her on to greater success in life(n)

programme.title: Harold & Kumar Get the Munchies (2004)
programme.desc: Two stoners spending a relaxing evening smoking pot develop an intense craving for the perfect burger. The pair decide to set off on a madcap quest to sate their appetites, encountering all manner of oddball characters and indulging in philosophical ramblings along the way. Comedy adventure, starring John Cho, Kal Penn, Paula Garces and Neil Patrick Harris(n)

programme.desc: Mac is found at the harbour in Jersey City, having escaped from a sinking car, but he is suffering from concussion and can recall only scant details of his kidnapping. However, the team resolves to track down his abductor and believes CCTV footage of the suspect driving through a toll barrier in another vehicle is just the lead required. Starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.desc: An alcoholic cop is fired from the LAPD and starts a new life in a Boston suburb, where the town board recruits him as chief of police. During an investigation into the death of his predecessor, he gets caught up in what seems to be a straightforward case of domestic abuse, but ends up on the trail of a money-laundering scheme. Detective thriller, starring Tom Selleck, Stephanie March and Stephen Baldwin(n)

programme.title: Columbo: A Case of Immunity (1975)
programme.desc: A senior adviser to the king of a Middle Eastern nation plots to increase his own power by having the head of security at their American embassy killed and placing the blame on a group of dissidents. Columbo is assigned to crack the case, but the suspect's diplomatic immunity hinders the progress of the investigation. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Hector Elizondo and Sal Mineo(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Candidate for Crime (1973)
programme.desc: An ambitious senatorial candidate murders his campaign manager for threatening to expose his secret affair. To avoid suspicion, the politician makes the killing look as if he was the intended target of an assassination attempt that went wrong - but ends up having to pit his wits against the slovenly sleuth. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Jackie Cooper, Ken Swofford and Tisha Sterling(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Mind Over Mayhem (1974)
programme.desc: A scientist is overjoyed when his son follows in his footsteps, receiving widespread acclaim for a revolutionary new theory. When a fellow boffin produces evidence of plagiarism, the ruthless father resorts to murder to save his son from a scandal. But he reckons without the dishevelled detective, who sees through his efforts to make the killing look like the work of burglars. Crime drama, with Peter Falk, Jose Ferrer and Lew Ayres(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Death Lends a Hand (1971)
programme.desc: The crumpled cop investigates when a private eye murders his client's adulterous wife because she refuses to submit to his blackmail threats, and arranges the crime scene to make it look as if she was the victim of a mugging gone wrong. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ray Milland and Robert Culp(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part one of two. Abby's homeland security think-tank is compromised when its leader is found to have been murdered, and a theoretical guide to how to pull off a terror attack is stolen(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Part two of two. American drama following the work of the Naval Criminal Investigative Service that investigates cases involving the US Navy and Marine Corps. Starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames travel to Vietnam to pick up a man who has recently confessed to murdering a 10-year-old actor in 1992. However, it is not long before the detectives find holes in his story, and begin to reassess the original investigation - leading them to believe the suspect may be much closer to home than anyone thought. Guest starring Liza Minnelli(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: A former professional hockey player joins forces with a private eye to form an unusual investigative team. First episode of the comedy, starring Jason Priestley and Cindy Sampson(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The hunt for a missing teenage girl takes an emotional toll on Sgt Dodds, and DNA evidence becomes the crucial link the team needs to identify the youngster's abductor. Hard-hitting and emotional series chronicling the life and crimes of the New York Police Department, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson hopes justice will be served as child abductor Lewis Hodda goes on trial. However, when a plea deal is rejected, Barba must rely on decades-old evidence to make his case, and faces off against former SVU colleague Dr Huang. Crime drama, guest starring Tom Sizemore(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A high-school student succumbs to the flirtations of an attractive female teacher, and begins to plan a clandestine encounter. However, he quickly finds himself in a far more terrifying situation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The case against Greek artefact smuggler Sebastian Diakos is reopened, and Stella learns her old mentor Professor Papakota has been implicated. Visiting Greece to continue her inquiries, she is unprepared for the connection she finds between Papakota and her birth mother. Gary Sinise and Melina Kanakaredes star(n)

programme.title: Training Day
programme.desc: Crime drama series, based on the film of the same name. Detective Frank Rourke heads an LAPD unit that goes after the most dangerous criminals, but uses questionable methods to get results. Idealistic young officer Kyle Craig is brought in to monitor and report on Rourke for their superiors, by posing as his trainee. Bill Paxton, Justin Cornwell and Katrina Law star(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to help a seriously injured and traumatised woman remember the events that led to the fatal shooting of her street dancer boyfriend in their hotel room. programme.desc: Pierce's new life in Paris is upended when the FBI enlists his help on a dangerous international case. Meanwhile, Max and Paul try to persuade Chancellor Kinney to let Pierce teach again in an effort to get him back in Chicago. Crime drama, starring Eric McCormack, Arjay Smith and LeVar Burton(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the fatal shooting of two professors, which occurred soon after one of the academics campaigned against the treatment of women in the Middle East. Their inquiries lead them to a Muslim with strong beliefs - and an extreme dislike of females. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a white police officer, and the trail ultimately leads to a former black rights activist. As the trial gets under way, racial tensions in the city are inflamed with the emergence of evidence linking the dead man to several white supremacist organisations. McCoy realises whichever verdict is returned, it is guaranteed to be greeted with public outrage(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Van Buren orders Briscoe and Green to reinvestigate unsolved cases, starting with the murder of a teenager 20 years previously. However, they discover much of the evidence gathered at the time has vanished, and the detective in charge of the case may have pursued an innocent man to protect the real culprit. An unexpected confession allows the case to end up in court again, but legal trickery makes a conviction an unlikely prospect(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The amateur detective is called on to help her niece, a talented executive at an advertising agency, when she is accused of murdering her boss. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica helps a friend whose diving expedition for buried treasure is hindered by a series of sinister incidents - including a suspicious death. Angela Lansbury and Tom Bosley star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the suspicious death of a reality TV contestant. They discover the show's producers had been provoking bad feeling toward the dead man among his fellow participants, while a cameraman reveals that his last moments were captured on film. However, the incriminating tape cannot be found. Jerry Orbach and Steven Hill star(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green have difficulty pinning the death of a strangled woman on their prime suspect, drug dealer Francis 'Taz' Partell. However, while questioning one of his former associates, they discover new evidence indicating he was responsible for another murder in the Bronx(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee discovers his flat has been torn apart by a robber trying to locate an item of great value hidden somewhere by the convicted criminal who previously owned the unit. Mwanwhile, congress woman Flemming tries to persuade Director Vance to pursue a career in politics. Mary Stuart Masterson guest stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: The murder of a hip-hop producer initially leads detectives to believe he was killed for reasons connected to his career, but evidence later emerges to suggest it was actually due to a romantic liaison. A suspect is finally identified - but a shock confession demolishes the prosecution team's case. Chris Noth stars(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Benson and her team participate in a city-wide operation to close in on people charged with exploiting underage Catholic schoolchildren, with judges, legislators, lawyers and even members of the NYPD all inplicated in the scandal. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: One of the NYPD's own is implicated in a cover-up, and the SVU tries to unravel a complex sex trafficking operation with roots in government offices, the police department and the Catholic Church. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

Undeterred, Carisi decides to go undercover in an attempt to reveal the perpetrator's identity. New York-set police crime drama, directed by and starring Mariska Hargitay, with Peter Scanavino(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murderer wages a cyber war on healthcare workers he holds a grudge against. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise and Anna Belknap, with Greg Germann (Ally McBeal)(n)

Crime drama, starring Hill Harper(n)

programme.desc: Mac and the team uncover the lair of serial murderer the 'Compass Killer' while investigating how he escaped from the World's Fair site in Queens. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.desc: The team investigates the stabbing of a teacher whose body has been found in a caretaker's cupboard. The hunt for her killer leads to the discovery that she was caught up in a love triangle at school involving a student with multiple identities. Legal drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man with a history of violence is arrested for the murder of his son's school ice-hockey coach, but pleads mitigating circumstances. Helped by a glib defence lawyer, he claims that he committed the crime while suffering from a previously unknown mental condition he calls 'sports rage'(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the discovery of four bodies in a jeweller's shop. Suspicion soon falls on the husband of one of the victims, who is revealed to have changed his identity to escape a shady past. The shop's security tapes are subsequently discovered in his flat, but the defendant surprises everyone by insisting on representing himself in court - and makes a big impression on the jury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher teams up with her old journalist friend Haskell Drake to unravel the mysterious and sudden death of a ruthless and corrupt newspaper mogul. Angela Lansbury, Harry Guardino and Eugene Roche star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica puts her Hawaiian holiday on hold to clear private investigator Thomas Magnum of a double murder. Crossover episode with Magnum, PI guest starring Tom Selleck(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the death of Karen Hall, a staff member in the State Attorney General's Office, whose body has been found in the Hudson River - and her boss Frank Conroy quickly becomes a suspect. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a couple found dead in their apartment, following a trail of drugs and money to the wife of an army officer responsible for anti-narcotics operations in Colombia. Despite the woman's reluctance to co-operate with the police, McCoy convinces her she has no choice but to risk her life in a bid to catch the murderer. Charlotte d'Amboise guest stars(n)

programme.desc: A contestant on a reality dating show claims to have been raped. Co-operating with the SVU, the programme's producers agree to let Benson and her team go undercover on the set for an incognito investigation. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A corrections officer is arrested, accused of sexually assaulting his female charges both inside the prison system and beyond. programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The DIY SOS team are out of their comfort zone this week, joining forces with two world-famous institutions - Great Ormond Street Hospital and the Chelsea Flower Show - for a special challenge. Gardener Chris Beardshaw has promised his gold medal-winning garden from the flower show to the hospital - now all Nick Knowles and his fellow builders have to do is crane the display across London and rebuild it on the hospital. It's a hugely ambitious build, with tricky logistics and emotional volunteers. But knowing how much the garden will prove welcome respite for families, the team is determined not to fail(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The team descends on Swansea to tackle one of their biggest challenges to date, as they build a centre and supported housing for young people in care and leaving care. This special programme also shares the stories from some of Wales' most vulnerable young people as well as the founder of the Roots Foundation Wales, a charity that supports young people in and leaving care. The team, with the help of hundreds of volunteers, build a bespoke new centre and transitional flats from the ground up for Roots, a charity, part-funded by BBC Children in Need despite storms and a tight 11-day build schedule(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles, his team and a group of volunteers are in Monmouth, Wales, to transform the family home of Charlotte, a mother recovering from a stroke that left her with brain damage, speech loss and partial paralysis. The current layout of her home makes it difficult for Charlotte to move around and have her physiotherapy treatment, so the team redesign the house to make things easier for her, her husband Rob and their children(n)

programme.title: Worlds Apart with Oksana Boyko
programme.desc: Worlds Apart is a fast-paced, in-depth discussion on the pressing issues of the day. The host Oksana Boyko strives to depart from the traditional Q-and-A form of interview in favor of an emotive and engaging conversation. While the title and format of the program presuppose differences of opinion, WA's main goal is to facilitate public debate in an intelligent and respectful manner(n)

programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which 30 recurring players compete for a daily prize of up to £1,500 and the chance to win £10,000. Every right answer takes them a step closer to a shot at that jackpot - but a single 'impossible' answer knocks them out for the day(n)

programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman mark the impending arrival of the Rio 2016 Olympic Games by inviting Olympians who have previously won gold medals to take part in the unorthodox general knowledge quiz.
